Magaalada Gaalkacyo waxaa maanta ka dhacay kulan muhiim ah oo dhexmaray Guddoomiyaha Guddiga Doorashooyinka Qaranka iyo wakiilka Ururka Siyaasadeed ee KARAAMA ee Galmudug, iyadoo kulanka uu hoggaaminayay wakiilka Ururka KARAAMA, Sh. Muhyadin Yusuf Barre, oo ay wehelinayeen xubno ka tirsan Golaha Fulinta.
Kulanka ayaa lagu falanqeeyay:
-Habbeynta iyo dardargelinta hannaanka doorashada
-Xoojinta wada-shaqeynta Guddiga Doorashada iyo ururrada siyaasadeed
-Kobcinta ka qeybgalka bulshada iyo wacyigelinta doorashooyinka
Guddoomiyaha Doorashada Qaranka ayaa adkeeyay muhiimada wada-tashiga joogtada ah, halka wakiilka Ururka KARAAMA uu bogaadiyay dadaalka Guddiga, isagoo caddeeyay in ururku ka go’an yahay kaalin muuqata ka qaadashada hirgelinta doorashooyin hufan.

Waxaan kaloo boggaadinayaa dhammaan inta ka qaybqaadatay codeynta. Guuleysta.

OLOLAHA DOORASHADA GOLAHA DEEGAANKA GOBOLKA BANAADIR OO SI RASMI AH UGA BILOWDAY DEGMADA KAARAAN.

Ururka Horumar iyo Midnimo Qaran NPU ayaa maanta si rasmi ah uga bilaabay Degmada Kaaraan ololaha Doorashada Golaha Deegaanka ee Gobolka Banaadir, iyada oo shacabka deegaanka iyo taageerayaal farabadan ay si weyn ugu soo baxeen furitaanka ololaha.

Munaasabadda furitaanka oo ka dhacday gudaha Degmada kaaraan ayaa waxaa kasoo qeyb galay masuuliyiin sare oo Ururka NPU ah, musharaxiinta degmada, dhalinyaro, haween iyo odayaal dhaqameed, kuwaas oo muujiyay taageero ballaaran iyo rajo ku aaddan isbeddelka adeegyada bulshada.

Xoghaye ku xigeenka Ururka Horumar iyo Midnimo Qaran NPU Xoghaye Luul issack Adam Halgan ayaa ku dhawaaqday in uu si toos ah u furmay Ololaha Doorashada Golaha Deegaanka Gobalka Banadir.

Guddoomiyaha ololaha Doorashooyinka Hormar iyo Midnimo Qaran Mudane: Jalaalu-Diin moalim omar ayaa khudbad uu jeediyay ku sheegay in Kaaraan ay noqotay degmadii ugu horraysay ee si rasmi ah looga bilaabay ololaha gobolka, isaga oo sheegay in Ururka NPU uu diiradda saarayo,

• Horumarinta adeegyada bulshada
• Amniga iyo kala dambeynta
• Nadaafadda iyo bilicda magaalada
• Kobcinta ganacsiga iyo shaqo abuurka dhalinyarada
• In la dhiso gole deegaan hufan oo dadka u adeega

Dadka deegaanka oo isugu jiray waayeel, haween iyo dhallinyaro ayaa soo dhaweeyay bilowga ololaha, iyaga oo ku tilmaamay fursad lagu hormarin karo degmadooda iyo guud ahaan gobolka Banaadir.

Ololaha doorashada ayaa maalmaha soo socda si rasmi ah uga sii socon doona degmooyinka kale ee gobolka, iyadoo xisbiga uu ballan qaaday olole nabdoon, wacyi-gelin leh oo ku dhisan danta guud.

April 1, 1983

The Advanced Tactical Fighter Integration (ATFI) F-16 team stands for a photo celebrating the 50th flight of their test aircraft. Although the F-16A was already in operational service, General Dynamics submitted an airframe for the ATFI stakes.

AFTI was a joint effort involving the US Navy, Air Force, and NASA to test and validate new onboard systems for integration into current and future aircraft designs. With the goal of improving lethality and survivability, AFTI's F-16 team sought to validate these new technologies for low-altitude ground attack, SEAD, and air-to-air combat scenarios.

Their efforts paved the way for the new Automated Maneuvering Attack System (AMAS), which allowed for more-accurate weapons delivery while the aircraft was maneuvering, thus minimizing exposure time to ground threats. Another technological breakthrough was the introduction of the Automatic Ground Collision Avoidance System (Auto-GCAS), which could automatically take control of the aircraft to prevent crashing at lower altitudes. This technology would later see widespread integration throughout the commercial aviation industry.

Learn more about the technical evolution of the F-16 Fighting Falcon in the new book, "Viper Alley: A Combat History of the F-16."

MADAXWEYNE XASAN SHEEKH OO WARQADAHA AQOONSIGA DANJIRENIMO KA GUDDOOMAY SAFIIRRADA DALALKA MASAR, INDONESIA, SWEDEN, CUBA, FINLAND, NORWAY, CANADA IYO SPAIN
 
​Muqdisho, Diseembar 03, 2025; Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa munaasabad ku qabsoomtay Madaxtooyada Qaranka kaga guddoomay Warqadaha Aqoonsiga Danjirenimo Safiirro ka socda siddeed dal oo kala ah; Masar Mudane Mohamed Salah Keshtah, Indonesia Mudane Witjaksono Adji, Sweden Mudane Hans Henric Lundvqist, Cuba Marwo Inés Fors Fernandez, Canada Mudane Joshua Brenber Tabah, Finland Marwo Riina Riikka Heikka, Norway Marwo Siv Cathrine Moe iyo Spain Mudane Jaime Alejandro Moreno Bua.

Madaxweynaha oo ugu hambalyeeyay Danjireyaasha xilka loo soo igmaday, ayaa la wadaagay in dowladda iyo shacabka Jamhuuriyadda Soomaaliya ay soo dhaweynayaan, kuna garab sinayaan gudashada waajibaadkooda diblomaasiyadeed, kaas oo ay ugu horreeyso xoojinta iskaashiga iyo xiriirka labo geesoodka ah.

Dhankooda, Danjireyaasha cusub ayaa Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda  soo gaarsiiyey salaan iyo farriimo ay ka sideen hoggaanka dalalkooda, waxa ayna muujiyeen in ay mudnaan siinayaan xiriirka diblomaasiyadeed ee kala dhexeeya Soomaaliya, iyagoo ka mahad celiyey qaabilaadda iyo soo dhaweynta loogu sameeyey Villa Somalia.

Munaasabaddan ayaa si maamuus sare leh ugu qabsoomtay Madaxtooyada Qaranka, iyadoo ay ka qeyb qaateen cutubyo ka tirsan Ciidamada Qalabka Sida oo salaan sharaf ku maamuusay Danjireyaasha warqadahooda u gudbiyey Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda.

"Waxaan aad uga Xumahay in Boorama ay Maanta Mudaharaadyo noocan oo kale ahi ka dhaco."Garyaqaan Timo.

Waxa kale oo aan aad uga Xumahay in ay Xukumadeenu ay qaabkan taladeedu khaldantahay ee ay howshan u gashay, 

Xukumadu dalkan iyadaa Xukunta oo loo doortay doorkeeda shaqana maaha inay dadka iska horkeento balse waa inay dadka reer Somaliland maslaxadooda iyo wada jirkooda ka shaqayso islamarkaana ay Xaaladaha khatarta amni leh iyo doorka ay ka qaadan karto fahanto si aanay talada ama go’aan ay Xukuumadu gaadhaa u noqon mid amniga dalka dhib u gaysta, mid aan umada reer Somaliland ee walaalaha ah isu dirin oo aan isku dhac sababin waxaana ceeb ku ah Xukumada in go'aankeedu noqdo mid dhimasho iyo buuq ay fara galin dibadeedna soo gali karto maadaama maanta danaha siyaasada aynu wadamo badan isku hayno.

Waxaan Xukumada ugu baaqayaa inay joojiso go'aankeedan maadaama aan la garan karin oo aanay marka horeba Xukumadu qiimayn karin maxsuulka ka dhalanaya oo ah kan Imika socda iyo kana sii dari karo waxaana hadda Xukumadu hortaala sidii ay Xal deg deg ah uga gaadhi lahayd xaaladan hadda taagan oo aanay u sii fidi lahayn arintani.

MADAXWEYNE HASSAN SHEEKH OO GUDDOOMIYEY KULAN-DOCEED KA MID AH MADASHA DOOXA OO KU SAABSANAA DOWLAD-DHISKA SOOMAALIYA

Dooxa, Diseembar 07, 2025: Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa maanta guddoomiyey kulan gaar ah oo ku saabsanaa xoojinta dowlad-dhiska Soomaaliya iyo sidii loo mideyn lahaa taageerada caalamiga ah, kaas oo qeyb ka ahaa Madasha Dooxa ee siyaasadda iyo amniga.

Madaxweynaha ayaa kulnka ku soo bandhigay qorsheyaasha hirgalay ee Soomaaliya ay ku xaqiijinayso xasilloonida, amniga iyo dib-u-habeynta hay’adaha dowladda, isagoo tilmaamay in shacabka iyo dowladda Soomaaliya ay dagaal dhanka milatariga, dhaqaalaha iyo fikirka ah kula jiraan argagixiso caalami ah oo ku soo duushay dalkeenna.

Sidoo kale, Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ayaa ka hadlay hirgelinta doorashooyinka tooska ah oo meel wanaagsan maraya iyo muhiimadda ay leedahay dhammaystirka Dastuurka dalka oo aas-aas u ah dowladnimada, waxa uuna ku boorriyay beesha caalamka in taageeradooda ay noqoto mid isku duuban oo waafaqsan Qorshaha Qaran ee Soomaaliya.

Ugu dambayn, Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa muujiyey sida shacabka iyo dowladda Soomaaliya ay uga go’an tahay dhismaha dowlad adkaysi leh oo ku dhisan sharciyad, amni iyo horumar, isagoo uga mahadceliyey saaxiibada caalamka taageeradooda joogtada ah.

Kismaayo Update. 

Madaxweynaha Jubbaland Axmed Maxamed Islaam  ayaa si cad ugu adkeystay codsiga in Madaxweyne hore Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo uu ka qeyb galo shirka madasha mucaaradka ee lagu waday inuu bishan December ka dhaco magaalada Kismaayo. 

Inkasta oo shirka Kismaayo uu horey u qorsheysnaa, haddana wuxuu hakad ku jiraa kadib markii qaar ka mid ah siyaasiyiinta mucaaradka ay diideen ka-qeybgalka shirka haddii uu madasha soo fariisto Madaxweyne Farmaajo siyaasiyiinta sida xooggan uga soo horjeeda arrintan waxaa ka mid ah 
 • Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur Warsame
 • Ra’iisul Wasaarihii hore Xasan Cali Kheyre
 • Ra’iisul Wasaarihii hore Maxamed Xuseen Rooble

Kuwo badan oo mucaaradka ka tirsan ayaa weli la qancin la’ sida loo wajaho ka-qeybgalka Farmaajo iyo saameynta uu ku yeelan karo jihada siyaasadeed ee shirka.

Axmed Madoobe iyo Farmaajo – Isbeddelka Siyaasadeed

Intii uu Farmaajo xilka hayey xiriirka kala dhexeeya Madaxweynaha Jubbaland Axmed wuxuu ahaa mid aad u kacsanaa, iyadoo mararka qaar uu gaadhay heer dagaal siyaasadeed iyo mid militari oo ka dhex qarxay Dowladda Federaalka iyo Jubbaland. Degaanada Jubbaland ayaa markaas wajahay cadaadis siyaasadeed iyo dagaal toos ah oo ka dhashay khilaafka labada dhinac.

Hase yeeshee maanta Madaxweyne Axmed ayaa muujinaya isbeddel siyaasadeed oo waayo-aragnimo ku dhisan, isagoo aqbalay in Farmaajo uu qeyb ka noqdo madasha mucaaradka. 

Talaabadan ayuu ku muujinayaa biseyl siyaasadeed iyo awood uu uga gudbayo xanuunkii iyo khilaafkii hore ee Jubbaland kala dhexeeyay Farmaajo, taas oo dad badan u arkaan:
 • Qaangaarnimo siyaasadeed
 • Aragti fog oo ku wajahan mustaqbalka mucaaradka Soomaaliyeed
 • Tusaale nabadeyn iyo isu-soo-dhoweyn siyaasadeed

Shirka Mucaaradka ee Kismaayo wuxuu hadda marayaa meel xasaasi ah oo uu saameyn ku leeyahay mustaqbalka siyaasadda Soomaaliya. Go’aanka Jubbaland ee ku adkeysiga ka-qeybgalka Farmaajo wuxuu noqday mid xiisaddiisa leh, islamarkaana ay isha ku hayaan siyaasiyiin badan iyo bulshada Soomaaliyeed. 

Waxaa la sugayaa sida loola heshiin karo siyaasiyiinta diidan iyo in shirka Kismaayo uu noqon doono mid mideeya mucaaradka.

Shirka maanta u furmaya mucaaradka Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya wuxuu si guud u daaran yahay xaaladda siyaasadeed ee dalka, gaar ahaan khilaafka u dhexeeya mucaaradka iyo dowladda. Mucaaradku waxay muujinayaan cabasho ku saabsan habka hoggaaminta dowladda, iyagoo ku doodaya in talada dalka lagu koobsaday hal dhinac ama koox gaar ah, isla markaana ay diidan yihiin qaabka go’aan-qaadashada ee hadda jira.

Sidoo kale, shirku wuxuu si weyn diiradda u saaraya arrimaha doorashooyinka, halkaas oo mucaaradku ku dhaliilayaan habraaca doorashooyinka, gaar ahaan dib-u-dhacyada iyo muranka jira, iyagoo dalbanaya doorasho loo dhan yahay oo caddaalad ah, kana soo horjeeda muddo-kordhin ama heshiisyo hore oo muran dhaliyay. 
Arrimaha Dastuurka iyo nidaamka federaalka ayaa iyaguna ajandaha ku jira, iyadoo dood laga keenayo wax-ka-beddelka dastuurka, lana cabanayo in aan lala tashan mucaaradka iyo qaar ka mid ah maamul-goboleedyada, gaar ahaan dhinaca awood-qaybsiga federaalka.

Dhanka amniga, mucaaradku waxay eedeynayaan guuldarrooyin jira iyo habka loo maareeyay dagaalka Al-Shabaab, iyagoo su’aal gelinaya doorka ciidanka qaranka iyo saaxiibada caalamiga ah. Waxaa kale oo laga hadlayaa xiriirka caalamiga ah, iyadoo dhaliil loo jeedinayo sida dowladda ula macaamisho beesha caalamka, isla markaana laga cabsi qabo faragelin shisheeye ama heshiisyo aan hufnaan lahayn.

Ujeeddada guud ee shirka ayaa ah in mucaaradku yeeshaan mowqif mideysan, in la soo saaro warmurtiyeed rasmi ah, laguna saaro cadaadis siyaasadeed Dowladda Federaalka, iyadoo mararka qaarna la filayo baaq ku aaddan wada-hadal qaran.shirkaasi oo la filayo in uu ka qeyb-galaan Omar Sharmarke iyo Farmaajo

War-bixin Siyaasadeed | Kismaayo & Wajiyada Siyaasadda

Siyaasadda Soomaaliya waa wajiyaal badan, marna saaxiib, marna tartan. Xog iyo falanqayn siyaasadeed ayaa muujinaysa in Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, haddii uu u safro Kismaayo si uu ula kulmo mucaaradka, islamarkaana lagu khasbo in dalka loo celiyo doorasho dadban, ay suuragal tahay in uu qaato go’aan siyaasadeed oo lama filaan ah.

Ilo-wareedyo siyaasadeed ayaa tilmaamaya in xaalad noocaas ah, Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh uu codkiisa iyo saameyntiisa siyaasadeed ku shubi doono Madaxweynihii hore Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo, si looga hortago kala-qaybsanaan hor leh iyo fowdo siyaasadeed. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in mararka qaar dan qaran iyo xisaab siyaasadeed ay ka horreeyaan loollan shaqsiyeed.

Arrintani waxay si cad u iftiiminaysaa xaqiiq jirta: Siyaasaddu ma aha colaad joogto ah, balse waa xeelad ku dhisan duruuf iyo dano is beddelaya. Maanta waa tartan, berri waa is-gacan-qabsi.

👉 Gunaanad: Haddii doorasho dadban la aado, Kismaayo waxay noqon karta a halka lagu go’aaminayo jihada hoggaanka dalka, waxaana suuragal ah in Xasan Sheekh iyo Farmaajo ay ku midoobaan xaalad ku qasabtay, taas oo mar kale caddeyneysa in siyaasaddu leedahay wajiyaal badan.

Guud ahaan hanaanka doorashooyinka ee ku salaysan Hal qof iyo Hal cod waxa sal u ah codbixiye muddakar ah oo wacyigiisu sareeyo. 

Waxa aan is leeyahay maanta dadka reer Somaliland way ka dharagsanyihiin in aan wax dheef ah ku jirin codbixin kasta oo salaysan qabyaalad iyo dano gaar ah.

Goleyaasha sharci-dejinta iyo Goleyaasha deegaanadu waa ubucda Dawladnimada dimuqraadiga ah. 

Sharci-dejinta shaqadoodu Kuma koobna oo qudha sharci-dejinta, hase ahaatee, waa korjooge iyo daba-gale sharciga ku ilaaliya waaxda fulinta, islamarkaana hubiya in adeegsiinta fulintu uu yahay mid u fulaya sidii loogu talagalay. 

Goleyaasha deegaanaduna waa adeeg bixiyayaasha ugu muhiimsan Dawladnimada, maadaama oo la rabo in adeegsiintu u daadegto heer deegaan, islamarkaana ay iyagu yihiin kuwa ugu xogogaalsan duruufaha ka Jira deegaanadooda. 

Labadaa gole ee muhiim ka ahi, si ay u gutaan waajibaadkooda masiiriga ah, waxa lagama-maarmaan ah in ay usoo banbaxaan dad hanankara masuuliyaddaa baaxadda leh, islamarkaana ujeedadooda koobaad tahay u adeegidda muwaadiniinta. 

Waxa aan ku adkaynayaa Xisbiyada Qaranka iyo guddiyada deegaanada ee soo xulaya murashaxiintu in ay kala haadiyaan murashaxiinta, islamarkaana masuuliyad iska saaran in ay dadka hor keenaan kuwo Ilaahay ka baqaya oo ay dhab ka tahay in ay u khidmeeyaan dalkooda iyo dadkooda. 

Ugu danbayn waa masuuliyad saaran  codbixiyayaashu in ay codkooda u dhiibtaan si masuuliyad leh.

Dr Ali Moussa Iye jawabtiisi

Xeer iyo Xarago: Réponse à la polémique sur le Xeer Ciise et son inscription au patrimoine mondial - (Somali and English versions under)

Jusqu’à présent, je m’étais abstenu de prendre part à la polémique regrettable née de l’organisation d’un événement culturel à #Zeila, destiné à célébrer la reconnaissance du Xeer Ciise comme patrimoine culturel immatériel de l’humanité. 
J’ai toutefois été profondément choqué par l’accumulation de contrevérités, la virulence de certains propos haineux et la diffusion d’affirmations dénuées de tout fondement. Plus encore, j’ai été attristé de constater à quel point des agitateurs des réseaux sociaux peuvent dicter les termes du débat public, contraindre des responsables politiques, des autorités traditionnelles et des intellectuels à se positionner face à leurs élucubrations, tout en reléguant au silence les voix de la raison, du discernement et de la sagesse.
Interpellé en tant qu’auteur du premier ouvrage consacré au #XeerCiise, j’ai estimé nécessaire de prendre la parole afin d’apporter des éclaircissements sur plusieurs points ayant fait l’objet de controverses. J’ai choisi de le faire par écrit, plutôt que de mêler ma voix à des invectives dictées par la seule émotion. L’écriture impose en effet rigueur et précision, et permet d’étayer les faits établis par des documents, des références et des éléments probants.
Dans cette contribution, rédigée en trois langues — anglais, français et somali —, je me concentrerai sur quatre allégations relatives au Xeer Ciise et à sa reconnaissance par l’UNESCO, à propos desquelles je suis en mesure d’établir la vérité.

1. Xeer Somali ou Xeer Ciise ?

Lorsque j’ai choisi de consacrer ma thèse de doctorat à ce patrimoine, celui-ci portait déjà l’appellation de Xeer Ciise. Je n’ai donc procédé à aucune réinterprétation ni à aucune réappropriation d’un patrimoine somali. Cette dénomination était établie de longue date et reconnue non seulement par les Issas, mais aussi par les autres groupes somalis, ainsi que par des peuples voisins. Depuis des siècles, le terme Xeer Ciise désigne un ensemble structuré de lois, de normes, de principes et de procédures formant un système distinct des autres corpus de savoirs. Il dispose de sa propre histoire, d’une cohérence interne, d’une littérature spécifique et même d’un vocabulaire juridique qui lui est propre.
Dans mon travail de recherche, je me suis attaché à analyser les contextes historique, anthropologique et culturel de son émergence et de son élaboration. 
J’ai notamment étudié les affinités culturelles partagées par les peuples couchitiques — Oromo, Afar, Somali, Beja, Saho, entre autres — avant d’examiner les concepts, les principes, les valeurs et les visions du monde communs au peuple somali sur lesquels le Xeer Ciise s’est appuyé. Ce n’est que dans la seconde partie de mon ouvrage que j’ai abordé les spécificités qui lui sont propres.
J’y ai également montré comment, à une période de profonds bouleversements dans la Corne de l’Afrique, les Issas ont fondé une véritable société de droit, structurée autour d’un contrat socio-politique — le Xeer Ciise — élaboré au XVIᵉ siècle par des érudits versés à la fois dans la culture somalie, les textes juridiques islamiques et les systèmes d’organisation socio-politique des États musulmans de la région.
Ces caractéristiques intrinsèques du Xeer Ciise constituent des faits établis et incontestables. C’est précisément pour cette raison qu’il a été présenté à l’UNESCO par trois États et reconnu comme patrimoine culturel immatériel de l’humanité, illustrant la créativité d’un groupe appartenant au peuple somali. Cette reconnaissance a, à juste titre, été accueillie avec fierté et satisfaction par la grande majorité des communautés somalies à travers le monde.

2. Lobbying ou processus transparent d’inscription à l’UNESCO ?

La reconnaissance d’un élément culturel comme patrimoine culturel immatériel de l’humanité ne procède ni d’une campagne de lobbying ni d’initiatives individuelles. Elle s’inscrit dans un processus strictement encadré et rigoureusement codifié, comprenant plusieurs étapes : le consentement écrit des communautés concernées, l’évaluation du dossier par un organe d’experts indépendants de l’UNESCO, puis son examen final par un Comité intergouvernemental composé de représentants de vingt-quatre États parties.
Une telle procédure exclut toute forme de manipulation, d’ingérence interne ou externe, ainsi que tout soupçon de népotisme. Elle repose exclusivement sur la qualité, la cohérence et la crédibilité des informations soumises, ainsi que sur leur conformité aux valeurs et aux principes éthiques de l’UNESCO. À ceux qui prétendent remettre en cause ce mécanisme sans en maîtriser les règles, je ne peux que leur recommander la retenue, au risque de se discréditer inutilement auprès des instances internationales.

3. Reconnaissance culturelle ou revendication territoriale ?

Contrairement aux allégations relayées par certains agitateurs, le dossier soumis à l’UNESCO ne contient strictement aucune référence à des revendications territoriales. Il se limite à l’énoncé d’une réalité factuelle et démographique : les Somali-Issa vivent dans les trois États soumissionnaires — l’est de l’Éthiopie, le sud de Djibouti et le nord de la Somalie. Aucun document cartographique ni aucun élément suggérant une quelconque prétention territoriale n’a été joint au dossier.
L’ensemble de ces informations est aisément vérifiable dans les documents officiels, publiés en toute transparence sur le site de l’UNESCO.

4. « Ouverture de livre » ou événement culturel ?

Depuis plusieurs semaines, de nombreuses personnes — y compris, parfois, des responsables politiques — évoquent une prétendue « ouverture de livre (Buug la furayo), sans même s’interroger sur le sens réel d’une telle expression. Or, dès l’origine, il a toujours été clairement établi qu’il s’agissait de l’organisation, à Zeila, d’un événement culturel visant à célébrer la reconnaissance internationale du Xeer Ciise, à l’instar de ce qui a déjà été fait à Djibouti, Dire Dawa, Hargeisa, Mogadishu, Bruxelles, Ottawa et dans d’autres villes à travers le monde.
Malgré les mises au point répétées, certains persistent à ressasser ces formules creuses relatives à une supposée « ouverture de livre ». Il convient pourtant de rappeler que mon ouvrage « Le Verdict de l’Arbre. Le Xeer Issa : essai sur une démocratie endogène africaine » a été publié d’abord en français en 1990 et que celui d’Abdallah Hadji intitulé  « Xeer Ciise (Xeer Waa Xakame) »  — fréquemment brandi sur les réseaux sociaux — est paru en somali  en 2010. Ces deux ouvrages ont été, depuis longtemps, largement diffusés, étudiés et débattus à l’échelle régionale.
Mon ouvrage a notamment été présenté dans le cadre de conférences consacrées aux Etudes somalies et africaines, ainsi que lors de divers forums internationaux portant sur les savoirs endogènes des peuples africains et leur contribution au progrès de l’humanité.

Conclusion:

L’ensemble des éléments exposés conduit à une conclusion claire : le Xeer Ciise ne constitue pas le véritable enjeu du débat actuel. Il sert davantage de prétexte à la réactivation d’agendas politiques et territoriaux. Ces agendas ne sont d’ailleurs pas nouveaux ; ils trouvent leur origine dans la guerre civile somalienne et dans les recompositions qui ont accompagné la création du Somaliland. La contestation contemporaine autour du Xeer Ciise ne fait ainsi que révéler au grand jour des différends territoriaux persistants, que les responsables politiques du Somaliland n’ont, jusqu’à présent, ni su ni voulu résoudre de manière impartiale, équitable et conforme au droit. Face à l’escalade préoccupante alimentée par les passions, les frustrations et les attentes accumulées, il leur incombe donc d’adopter une posture responsable, fondée sur le respect de la légalité, de la justice et de l’intérêt général.
Dans ce type de situation, la pratique courante consiste à mettre en place une Commission indépendante, dont la composition est acceptée par l’ensemble des parties prenantes, et disposant de la légitimité, de la compétence et de l’autonomie nécessaires pour examiner de manière impartiale les revendications en présence, évaluer la validité des documents historiques et des preuves d’occupation avancées, et formuler des décisions éclairées.
Une telle démarche contribuerait à apaiser les tensions et à recentrer le débat sur le terrain de la raison et du dialogue. En attendant, cette région longtemps marginalisée a surtout besoin de paix, d’écoles, de centres de santé, de points d’eau, de routes — bref de projets de développement concrets et durables au service de ses populations.

Ali Moussa Iye

Xeer iyo Xarago : Response to the controversy over the Xeer Ciise and its inscription on the UNESCO World Heritage list

Until now, I have refrained from entering into the deplorable controversy triggered by the organization of a cultural event in Zeila to celebrate the recognition of the Xeer Ciise as an Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity. I was appalled by the display of falsehoods and hateful speech and saddened to see how social media agitators can dictate the terms of public debate, compel political and traditional leaders as well as intellectuals to react to their absurdities, and silence the voices of reason, discernment, and wisdom.
Having been called upon as the author of the first book on the Xeer Ciise, I felt it necessary to intervene in order to clarify certain controversial points for those who are still capable of reasoning. 
I chose to do so in writing rather than adding my voice to vociferations driven solely by emotion. Writing has the advantage not only of imposing rigor and clarity, but also of allowing the presentation of documents and references to support established facts and the evidence provided.
In this response, written in three languages—English, French, and Somali—I will focus on four allegations relating to the Xeer Ciise and its recognition by UNESCO, on which I am in a position to establish the truth.

1. Xeer Somali or Xeer Ciise?

When I chose to devote my doctoral dissertation to this heritage, it already bore the name Xeer Ciise. I therefore did not rebrand or reappropriate Somali heritage.This designation was known and recognized as such not only by the Issa, but also by other Somali groups and even by neighbouring peoples. The term Xeer Ciise has been used for centuries to refer to a set of laws, norms, principles, and procedures that constitute a system distinct from other bodies of knowledge. It has its own history, logic, literature, and even its own legal jargon.
In my research, I sought to understand the historical, anthropological, and cultural contexts of its emergence and development. I examined in particular the shared cultural affinities among Cushitic peoples (Oromo, Afar, Somali, Beja, Saho, etc.). I then analyzed the concepts, principles, values, and worldviews shared by the Somali people upon which the Xeer Ciise was built. It is only in the second part of my book that I analyzed the specific features of the Xeer Ciise and the particularities that explain its designation.
I also demonstrated how the Issa, during a period of major upheaval in the Horn of Africa, established a true rule-based society structured around a socio-political contract—the Xeer Ciise—developed in the 16th century by founders familiar with Somali culture, Islamic legal texts and the socio-political organizational systems of Muslim states in the region.
These distinctive features of the Xeer Ciise are undeniable facts, and it is for this reason that it was submitted to UNESCO by three countries and recognized as a heritage of humanity and as an example of the creativity of a community that is part of the Somali people. This recognition was rightly welcomed with pride and satisfaction by most Somali communities around the world.

2. Lobbying or a transparent UNESCO inscription process?

The recognition of a cultural element as Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity does not result from a lobbying campaign, let alone from individual intervention. There is a precise process and a clear procedure involving several stages, including written consent from the concerned communities, an evaluation of the file by a committee of independent experts, and a review by an Intergovernmental Committee composed of representatives from 24 countries worldwide.
This procedure allows neither manipulation, nor internal or external interference, nor nepotism. It is based on the relevance, coherence, and reliability of the information provided, as well as its compliance with UNESCO’s ethical values and principles. To those who seek to challenge this mechanism, I can only advise them to avoid discrediting themselves before international institutions.

3. Recognition or territorial claim?

Contrary to the allegations spread by certain agitators, the file submitted to UNESCO contains absolutely no reference to territorial claims. It simply states a factual reality: Somali-Issa live in three submitting countries—Eastern Ethiopia, Southern Djibouti, and Northern Somalia. No geographical map or element suggesting any territorial claims whatsoever was included in the file. These facts are easily verifiable in the official documents published transparently on UNESCO’s website.

4. “Book opening” or cultural event?

For several weeks now, many people—including at times political leaders—have been referring to a supposed “book opening” (Buug la furayo) without even questioning the real meaning of such an expression. Yet it was clear from the outset that this concerned the organization of a cultural event in Zeila to celebrate the recognition of the Xeer Ciise as World Heritage, just as has already been done in Djibouti, Dire Dawa, Hargeisa, Mogadishu, Brussels, Ottawa, and other cities around the world.
Despite repeated clarifications, some continue to repeat these empty formulas about a book opening. As a reminder, my book “ The Verdict of the Three. The Issa Xeer: An Essay on an African Endogenous Democracy” was first published in French  in 1990, and that of Abdallah Hadji “Xeer Ciise”(Xeer Waa Xakame) —frequently displayed on social media—was published in Somali in 2010. These two books have long since been exhibited and debated throughout the region. My book has been notably presented at conferences of Somali Studies, African Studies, and other international forums devoted to endogenous knowledge systems of African peoples and their contribution to the progress of humanity.

Conclusion

All the facts presented lead us to the following conclusion: the Xeer Ciise is not the real issue. It is rather a pretext for the reaffirmation of old political and territorial agendas. These agendas themselves are not new; they date back to the Somali civil war and the creation of Somaliland. The current contestation of the Xeer Ciise therefore merely reveals territorial disputes that the political leaders concerned have so far neither been able nor willing to resolve in an impartial, fair, and lawful manner.
In the face of the worrying escalation fueled by passions, frustrations, and expectations, it is therefore incumbent upon them to take responsible measures in respect of legality and justice.
In such situations, the usual practice is to establish an independent commission whose composition is accepted by all stakeholders, and which enjoys the trust and autonomy necessary to impartially examine the claims of all parties, the validity of historical documents and evidence of occupation presented, and to make informed decisions.
Such an approach would help ease tensions, calm passions and bring the debate back to the realm of reason. In the meantime, this long-neglected region is in far greater need of peace, schools, clinics, wells, job opportunities and roads—in short, development projects for the population.

Ali Moussa Iye

-----

Xeer iyo Xarago: Jawaab ku saabsan muranka Xeerk Ciise iyo aqoonsigiisa UNESCO

Ilaa hadda, waxaan ka fogaaday ka qaybqaadashada muranka ee ka dhashay abaabulkii munaasabad dhaqmeed lagu qabanayaye Saylac, taaso lagu xusayaye aqoonsiga Xeer Ciise. Waxaa iga yaabiyiyaye faafinta been-abuurka, hadallada naceybka ah iyo eedeymaha aan sal iyo raad lahayn. Waxa kale oo murugo leh sida ay kiciyeyaasha baraha bulshada u jiheeyeen doodda dadweynaha, una qasbeen hoggaamiyeyaasha siyaasadeed, kuwa dhaqanka iyo aqoonyahannada inay ka falceliyaan hadallo ceeb ah, isla markaana ay aamusiyeen codadka caqliga, garashada iyo xikmadda.
Anigoo ah qoraaga buuggii ugu horreeyay ee si gaar ah uga hadla Xeer Ciise, waxay igu qasabtay inaan bixiyo caddayn iyo faahfaahin ku saabsan dhowr qodob oo muran dhaliyay. Waxaan doortay inaan arrintan ku caddeeyo qoraal, halkii aan codkayga ku dari lahaa qaylo ku dhisan shucuur keliya. Qoraalku wuxuu layahaye nidaam, hufnaan iyo caddayn, wuxuuna sidoo kale suurto-geliyaa in la soo bandhigo dukumeenti iyo tixraacyo la hubin karo.
Jawaabtan, oo aan ku diyaariyay saddex luqadood—Ingiriisi, Faransiis iyo Soomaali—waxaan diiradda ku saari doonaa afar eedeymo oo la xiriira Xeer Ciise iyo aqoonsigiisa UNESCO, kuwaas oo aan aqoon u leeyahay inaan runtooda caddeeyo.

1. Xeer Soomaali mise Xeer Ciise?

Markii aan bilaabay daraasadda dhaxalkan, wuxuu horay u watay magaca « Xeer Ciise ». Anigu maaan sameyn dib-u-magacaabin iyo sheegasho dhaxal Soomaaliyeed. Magaca Xeer Ciise waxaa aqoonsan beesha Ciiso dhan, beelaha kalee Soomaaliyeed iyo qoomiyaddaha deriska nahaye. Ereyga Xeer Ciise oo qarniyo badan la adeegsanay wuxuu tilmaamaya nidaam sharci ku dhisan oo ka kooban xeerar, qawaaniin, mabaadi’ iyo habraacyo, ka duwan aqoonta kalee bulshada Ciise. Wuxuu leeyahay taariikh, falsafad, suugaan, iyo xitaa ereyo khibradeed oo gaar u ah.
Cilmi-baaristayda, waxaan si gaar ah ugu dadaalay inaan fahmo duruufaha taariikheed, bulsheed iyo dhaqameed ee sababaye Xeer Ciise. Waxaan darsaye dhaqanka u dhexeeya bulshooyinka Kuushiitiga layiraa (sida Oromoda, Canfarta, Soomaalida, Bejada, Saxooda). Kaa dibna waxaan falanqeeyay fikradaha, mabaadi’da, qimahasha iyo aragtida nololeed ay wadaagaan dadka Soomaaliyeed, ee Xeer Ciise ku salaysan yahaye. Qaybta labaad ee buuggayga  ayaan ku eegay astaamaha u gaarka ah Xeer Ciise ee sharxaya magaciisa.
Waxaan sidoo kale muujiyay sida ay beesha Ciise u aasaastay,  xilli kalaguur ah,  bulsho xeer ku dhisan oo dhammaystiran, kuna salaysan heshiis siyaasadeed, aye dejiyeen qarnigii 16-aad aqoonyaallo ku xil dheer dhaganka Somalidda, shareecada Islaamka iyo nidaamyadii maamul ee dawladahii Muslimiinta ee Geeka Afrika. 
Astaamahan u gaarka ah Xeer Ciise waa xaqiiqooyin aan lago marmi karin. Sababtaas awgeed ayay saddex dal ugu gudbiyeen UNESCO, oo loo aqoonsaday dhaxal caalamiya oo sharaxaya hal-abuurka bulsha ka mid ah dadweynaha Soomaaliyeed. Aqoonsigaa si farxad iyo sharaf layh’ ayaye Soomaalida ku kala nool daafaha dunida u soo daweeyeen intooda badan. 

2. Olele mise diiwaangelin hufan?

Aqoonsiga dhaxal dhaqameed inuu noqdo dhaxal caalamiya ah kama dhasho olole loo kalo ama faragelin shaqsiyeed. Wuxuu ku saleysan yahaye hannaan adag oo si gaar ah loo nidaamiyay, kana kooban dhowr marxaladood: oggolaansho qoraal ah oo ay bixiyaan bulshooyinka ay khusayso, qiimeyn ay sameeyaan guddi khubaro madaxbannaan iyo ugu dambeyn dib-u-eegis ay sameyso Guddiga Dawladeed o Caalamiya, oo ka kooban wakiillo ka socda 24 dal.
Nidaamkaaasi ma fasaxo isdaba-marin, faragelin gudaha ama dibadda ah, ama eex qaraabo. Wuxuu ku dhisan yahay muhiimadda, iyo kalsoonida xogta la gudbiyo, iyo u hoggaansanaanta qimayaasha iyo mabaadi’da anshaxeed ee UNESCO. 
Kuwa doonaya inay nidaamkan UNESCOka shaki geliyaan oo dacwad abuuraan, waxaan kula talin laha inay ka fikiraan talaabadaa ay ku ceeboobi doonaan.

3. Aqoonsi dhaqan mise sheegasho dhuleed?

Faylka loo gudbiyay UNESCO gabi ahaanba kuma jiro wax tixraac ah oo ku saabsan sheegasho dhuleed. Wuxuu kaliya xusayaa xaqiiqo jirta: in beesha Ciise ay ku nooshahay saddexda dal ee soo gudbiyay codsiga—Bariga Itoobiya, Koonfurta Jabuuti iyo Waqooyiga Soomaaliya. Ma jiro wax khariidad ah (geographic map) ama wax kale oo muujinaya sheegasho dhuleed oo lagu lifaaqay faylka. Arrimahan si fudud ayaa looga hubin karaa dukumeentiyada rasmiga ah ee si hufan loogu daabacay bogga UNESCO.

4. Buug lafurayo mise munaasabad dhaqan?

Toddobaadadii an soo dhaafnaye, dad badan— ku jiraan mas’uuliyiin siyaasadeed—ayaa ka hadlayay wax ay ugu yeereen “bug lafurayo”, iyagoo aan isweydiin macnaha  eraygaas. Haddana, bilowgiiba si cad ayaa loo sheegaye in arrintu ahayd abaabul munaasabad dhaqan oo lagu qabto Saylac, laguna xusayo aqoonsiga caalamiga ah ee Xeer Ciise, sida horey loogu xusay Jabuuti, Dire Dawa, Hargeysa, Muqdisho, Brussels, Ottawa iyo magaalooyin kale oo dunida ah.
Inkasta oo caddaynno badan la bixiyay, haddana qaar ayaa weli ku celceliya hadallo madhan oo ku saabsan “ bug lafurayo”. Xusuusin ahaan, buuggayga “ The Verdict of the Three. The Issa Xeer: An Essay on an African Endogenous Democracy” waxaa horta lagu daabacay Af Fransiis 1990-kii, buugga Cabdalla Xaaji “Xeer Ciise (Xeer waa Xakame) —oo si joogto ah loogu faafiyo baraha bulshada—waxaa lagu daabacay Af Somaali 2010-kii. Labadan buug muddo dheer ayaa la faafiyay, laga dooday laguna falanqeeyay guud ahaan gobolka. Buuggaygana waxaa si gaar ah loogu soo bandhigay shirar ku saabsan cilmi-baadhista Soomaalida, daraasaadaha Afrika, iyo fagaarayaal caalami ah.

Gunaanad

Xaqiiqooyinka aan soo bandhigay dhammaantood waxay inoo horseedayaan gunaanad cad: Xeer Ciise ma aha arrinta dhabta ah ee muranku ka taagan yahay. Wuxuu noqday marmarsiiyo lagu marsanayo ajandayaal ama himilooyin siyaasadeed iyo dhuleed. Ajandayaashaasna ma aha kuwo cusub; waxay ka dasheen dagaalkii sokeeye ee Soomaaliya iyo abuuristii Somaliland. Muranka hadda ka taagan Xeer Ciise wuxa kaliya uu muujinayaa khilaafaad dhuleed ay hoggaamiyeyaasha siyaasadeed ee Somaliland ay ilaa hadda ku guuldarreysteen ama ay diideen inay si dhexdhexaad ah, caddaalad leh oo sharci dowladeed waafaqsan ku xalliyaan.
Iyadoo lagu jiro xaalad halis ah oo ka dhalatay shucuuro ururay, waxaa waajib ku ah hoggaamiyeyaasha inay qaadaan tallaabooyin mas’uuliyad leh, kuna salaysan sharci dowladeed iyo caddaalad.
Xaaladaha noocan ah si looga jawaabo,  waxaa caadi ahaan loo xil saara Guddi madax-bannaan oo ay ogol yiheen kuna kalsoon yihiin dhammaan dhinacyada ay khusayso, si uu dhexdhexaad ah ugu eego sheegashooyinka dhinacyada kala duwan, saxnaanta dukumeentiyada taariikhiga ah iyo caddeymaha degan sheegashada  la soo bandhigo, si guddigaas u qaadan karo go’aanno xog-ogaal ah.
Talaabadaa oo kale waxay fudeedin kartaa dejinta xiisadda iyo soo celinta wadahadal ku dhisan caqli iyo xigmad. Inta go’aan kaas la gaarayo, gobolkan muddada dheer la dayacay waxu si gaar ah ugu baahan yahaye nabad, dugsiyo waxbarasho, xarumo caafimaad, biyo, fursado shaqo, waddooyin—si kooban, mashaariic dadka ku nool degaanka ka faa’ideesan karaan.

3 Arrimood oo Muujinaya Fashilka Dowladdii Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud

1️⃣ Dagaalka Al-Shabaab
Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday dagaal ballaaran oo ka dhan ah Al-Shabaab, balse natiijo la taaban karo ma dhalan. Magaalo keliya sida Xarar-Dheere ayaa xor ah, halka Maxaas ay Al-Shabaab dib ula wareegeen. Taasi waxay muujinaysaa istiraatiijiyad dagaal oo fashilantay iyo hoggaan aan leheen qorshe cad.

2️⃣ Dastuur Qabyadiisu Sii Jirto
Xukuumaddu waxay sheegtay in dastuurka la dhameystiray, qodobo muhiim ahna laga shaqo laga qabtay. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, dib ayaa looga laabtay go’aannadaas, taas oo ka dhigtay in mar walba lagu mashquulo “guul sheegasho” aan miro dhalin, halka dastuurkii uu weli qabyadiisii ku jiro.

3️⃣ Maamul-Goboleedyada iyo Doorasho La’aanta
Maamul-goboleedyadu waxay ku joogaan xukun si sharci-darro ah, inkastoo qorshuhu ahaa doorasho hal qof hal cod ah. Ilaa maanta wax tallaabo ah lama qaadin, mana muuqato rabitaan dhab ah oo ku aaddan hirgelinta doorashooyin xor iyo xalaal ah.

Doorashada qof iyo cod waa tiirka ugu muhiimsan ee dimuqraadiyad dhab ah lagu dhiso, waana waddada kaliya ee lagu xaqiijin karo in rabitaanka shacabka si toos ah u noqdo go’aanka dalka.                                    

Majirto gumaysi ka wayn in muwaadin laga hor istaago hankiisa iyo rajadiisa uu ka qabo dalkiisa, lana ku xiro mustaqbalkiisa gacan ku dhiigleyaal laaluush qaata, odayaal aan matalin dan guud, iyo hoggaamiyeyaal dowlad-goboleedyo oo dano gaar ah ku shaqeeya.

Khibraddu waxay ina bartay in laaluush, baryo iyo heshiisyo mugdi ah aanay waligood xal u noqon caqabadaha haysta dalkeenna. Nidaam ku dhisan oday tuug ah iyo hoggaan laaluush qaata ma dhaliyo cadaalad, xasillooni iyo horumar waara. 
Sidaas awgeed, waxaa lama huraan ah in dalkeenna ay ka dhacdo doorasho qof iyo cod ah oo xor iyo xalaal ah, kana madax bannaan faragelin iyo cadaadis.

Doorashada qof iyo cod waxay soo celisaa kalsoonida muwaadinka ee dowladnimada, waxayna awood u siisaa qof kasta ha ahaado nin ama naag, dhalinyaro ama waayeel in codkiisu yeesho miisaan la mid ah kan qof kasta oo kale. Tani waxay hoos u dhigtaa musuqmaasuqa, xoojisaa isla-xisaabtanka, kana dhigtaa hoggaanka mid mas’uul ka ah rabitaanka shacabka.

Waxaa mudan bogaadin dadaalka ay dowladdu waddo ee ku aaddan hirgelinta doorashada qof iyo cod. Tallaabooyinkan waa kuwo geesinimo leh, una baahan taageero bulsho, midnimo siyaasadeed, iyo adkaysi sharci.

 Haddii la dhammeystiro, waxay noqon doonaan dhaxal taariikhi ah oo dalku ku tallaabsado mustaqbal ka cadaalad badan, kana xor ah gacan-ku-rimisyada iyo laaluushka.

Madasha Badbaadada Gobolka Banaadir oo cambaareysay Guddi Beenaadka Doorashooyinka Dalka oo qaab Mucaawino Camal ah u qeybinaayo Kaar ku sheega Doorashooyinka Golaha Deegaanka Xamar

Madasha Badbaadada Gobolka Banaadir waxay si adag u cambaaraynaysaa fal-dambiyeedka abaabulan ee ay sida wadajirka ah iskaga kaashanayaan Kooxda JSP, Guddi Beenaadka Doorashooyinka Dalka iyo Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir, kuwaas oo si ula kac ah u ugu tumanaayo nidaamka  doorashada dalka, islamarkaana qaab mucaawino ah u qeybinaayo Kaar-ku-sheega Doorashooyinka Golaha Deegaanka Gobolka Banaadir, si Kooxda JSP ay iskugu caano shubaan Doorashada la sheegay in 25-ka December 2025 lagu qabaanayo Magaalada Muqdisho.

Madasha Badbaadada Gobolka Banaadir waxa ay cadeyneysaa in doorashada boobka ah ee lagu wado in Muqdisho ay ka dhacdo 25-ka December 2025 ay tahay qarax siyaasadeed oo si toos ah u halis gelinaya nabadda, xasilloonida, amniga iyo jiritaanka dowladnimada, isla markaana ay sababi karto fidno, fowdo iyo qalalaase amni iyo mid siyaasadeed oo aan la saadaalin karin cawaaqibka ka dhalan kara.

Madashu waxay si cad u sheegeysaa in mas’uuliyadda wixii ka dhasha doorashadan boobka ah ay si toos ah dusha uga saaran tahay Kooxda JSP ee uu hormuudka u yahay Madaweynaha, Guddi Beenaadka Doorashooyinka iyo Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir, kuwaas oo ku adkeysanaya waddo sharci-darro ah oo dalka u horseedeysa musiibo qaran.

Dhanka kale, Madasha Badbaadada Gobolka Banaadir, waxa ay si weyn u bogaadineysaa Shacabka Gobolka Banaadir oo iska diiday qaadashada Kaar ku sheega Doorashooyinka Xamar maadaama shalay si qasab lagu diiwaan galiyay ayaga oo aanan raali ka aheen, arintaan ayaa waxa si cad u muujineysaa sida shacabka Muqdisho aysan diyaar ugu ahayn in ay qeyb ka noqdaan khiyaano siyaasadeed oo lagu duudsiinaayo xuquuqdooda doorasho ee dastuuriga ah.

Ugu dambeyn, Madasha Badbaadada Gobolka Banaadir waxay baaq adag oo aan gorgortan lahayn u direysaa shacabka Soomaaliyeed, gaar ahaan kuwa Gobolka Banaadir, in ay si buuxda u qaadacaan, ugana fogaadaan, una diidaan ka qeybgalka doorashada boobka ah, maadaama ay tahay mid sharci darro ah oo lagu afduubanayo masiirkooda siyaasadeed, laguna wado waddo kalitalisnimo iyo burbur qaran ah.

Khamiista 25-ta Diseember 2025, waxa ay bilow u tahay xaqiijinta balanqaadkii aan Shacabka Soomaaliyeed u sameeyay xilligii ololaha doorashada 2022-dii. Kaas oo ahaa inaan dalka ka qaban doono doorasho qof iyo cod ah.

DOORASHADA MUQDISHO 25-ka December 2025
Maanta, 25-ka December 2025, waxaa si rasmi ah uga socda magaalada Muqdisho (Xamar) doorasho taariikhi ah oo lagu dooranayo Golayaasha Deegaanka ee Gobolka Banaadir. Doorashadan ayaa loo arkaa mid muhiim u ah hanaanka dimuqraadiyadda Soomaaliya, iyadoo lagu dadaalayo in shacabka deegaanka ay si toos ah u doortaan wakiilladooda. �
Arab News +1
Doorashadan ayaa ah mid taariikhi ah sababtoo ah waa midda ugu horreysay ee toos qof iyo cod ah lagu qabanayo Muqdisho muddo ka badan 50 sano. Waxaa ka qaybgalaya kumanaan qof oo codbixiyayaal ah, waxaana u tartamaya in ka badan 1,600 oo musharax si ay u noqdaan xubnaha golayaasha deegaanka ee degmooyinka Banaadir. �
Arab News
Si loo sugo nabadgelyo, waxaa magaalada lagu soo rogay heerar amni oo sare, iyadoo la dejiyay in ka badan 10,000 askari iyo booliis oo ka shaqeynaya sugidda amniga goobaha codbixinta iyo wadooyinka magaalada. �

War-bixin Guud: Xaaladda Doorashada Lagu Muransan Yahay ee Muqdisho
Hordhac
Maanta magaalada Muqdisho waxaa ka dhacay hannaan doorasho oo si weyn loo isla dhexmarayo, kaas oo ay si cad uga dhasheen eedeymo culus oo ku saabsan ku-takri-fal awoodeed, cabburin bulsho, iyo jebinta mabaadi’da doorasho xalaal ah. Dhacdadan ayaa si gaar ah u saameysay dadka barakacayaasha ah (IDPs), kuwaas oo lagu eedeeyay in si qasab ah loogu adeegsaday codbixin aan daahfurneyn.
Eedeymaha Muhiimka ah
Wararka laga helayo ilo kala duwan ayaa tilmaamaya in:
Dad barakacayaal ah (IDPs) lagu khasbay inay ka qeybqaataan doorasho aanay si buuxda u fahamsaneyn.
Qaar badan oo ka mid ah dadkaas aysan aqoon ciddii ay u codeynayeen ama ujeeddada codkooda.
Doorashada ay ka maqneyd wacyigelin, xorriyad doorasho, iyo ilaalin xuquuqeed oo waafaqsan hal-qof-hal-cod.
Madaxtooyada Federaalka (FGS), gaar ahaan Madaxweynaha, lagu eedeeyay inuu hormuud u ahaa ama oggolaaday hannaankan muranka dhalinaya.
Saameynta Siyaasadeed iyo Bulsho
Hannaankan doorasho ayaa:
Si weyn u dhaawacay kalsoonidii shacabka Soomaaliyeed ay ku qabeen geeddi-socodka dimuqraadiyadeed.
God dheer ku riday rajadii laga qabay in Soomaaliya u gudubto doorasho qof iyo cod ah oo xalaal ah.
Kordhiyay kala shaki siyaasadeed, gaar ahaan xiriirka u dhexeeya Dowladda Federaalka, maamul-goboleedyada qaarkood, iyo bulshada rayidka ah.
Halista ugu jirta inuu sharciyad darro ku abuuro natiijo kasta oo ka soo baxda doorashadan.
Aragtida Guud
Doorasho kasta oo lagu saleeyo qasab, cabsi, ama marin-habaabin dadka nugul sida IDPs ma noqon karto mid xalaal ah, mana dhisi karto nidaam dowladeed oo sharciyad iyo kalsooni leh. Bulshada Soomaaliyeed waxay muddo dheer sugayeen doorasho hufan, balse dhacdooyinkan ayaa u muuqda dib-u-gurasho halis ah.
Gunaanad
Dhacdadii maanta ka dhacday Muqdisho waxay astaan u tahay caqabado waaweyn oo weli hor taagan dimuqraadiyadda Soomaaliya. Haddii aan la sixin khaladaadkan, lana xaqiijin doorasho xor ah, daahfuran, oo aan cidna lagu qasbin, rajada shacabka iyo mustaqbalka siyaasadeed ee dalka ayaa sii wiiqmi doona.

Marka xaqiiqda laga hadlo Dadki shalay leeysugu keenay goobaha cod bixin ku sheega waxeey u badnayren sida aadba muuqaalada ka arkeyseen shaqaalaha doowlada hoose wasiiro xildhibaano iyo madaxweeyne HSM iyo xaaskiisa. Hadiiba tirinta cododka lagu soo gabagabeeyay saacado kooban.

Is casilaada Dubbe, iyo damaca Abdi xaashi.
"Danteenu waa qaranimada Jamuuriyad Somaliland" Gudoomiye Maxamed Ilig

Ictiraafka Somaliland: Isbeddel Istiraatiijiyeed oo Ka Baxsan Israa’iil – Falanqayn Siyaasadeed iyo Amni. 

Marka laga soo tago dareenkayga shaqsiyadeed ee ku aadan ictiraafka Gumaystaha israil ay siisay Somaliland, bal aynu si intaas ka baxsan u falanqaynno arintaan. 

Ictiraafka uu Gumeystaha Israil sheegay in uu siiyey Somaliland, laguma fasiri karo dhacdo gooni ah ama go’aan diblomaasiyadeed oo ku eg Gumaystahaas, Waa natiijo ka dhalatay isbeddello isku xiran oo muddo dheer ka socday nidaamka amniga caalamka, Geeska Afrika, iyo gaar ahaan fashilka dawladnimo ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya. 

Marka la eego dhanka aragtida istiraatiijiyeed, ictiraafkani wuxuu ka mid yahay dib-u-habayn ballaaran oo ay quwadaha caalamku ku sameynayaan qaabkii ay ula macaamili jireen Soomaaliya tan iyo burburkii dowladdii dhexe.

1. Ka Bixitaanka Beesha Caalamka iyo Calaamadaha Fashilka Dawladnimo.

Go’aanka Qaramada Midoobay ee ku saabsan xiritaanka xafiiskooda Soomaaliya 31 October 2026 waa calaamad istiraatiiji ah oo muujinaysa in hay’adaha caalamiga ahi ay qiimeeyeen in joogitaankooda soomaaliya uusan keeni karin natiijo siyaasadeed ama mid amni oo waarta oo la gaarsiiyo Soomaaliya. 

Ka bixitaanka UN-ku ma aha arrin maamul oo keli ah, balse waa qirasho dadban oo ah in mashruucii dhismaha hay'adaha dowladda ee Soomaaliya (state-building) uu ku fashilmay qaab-dhismeedka hadda jira.

Sidoo kale, tallaabada Maraykanka ee uu kula baxay safiirkiisii Soomaaliya, waxay xambaarsan tahay fariin diblomaasiyadeed oo culus, taas oo ah in aan Muqdisho loo arkin xarun amni iyo mid siyaasadeed oo lagu kalsoonaan karo. 

Taasi waxay hoos u dhigaysaa sharciyadda caalamiga ah ee Dowladda Federaalka, waxayna sii daciifinaysaa awooddeeda ku aaddan matalaadda qaranka.

2. Burburka Amniga Gudaha: UNSOM, CXDS, iyo Al-Shabaab.

Hawlgalka UNSOM wuxuu wajahayaa dhibaato dhaqaale oo ba’an, mushahar la’aan, iyo kalsooni darro. Qorshihii kala guurka ee mas’uuliyadda amniga loogu wareejin lahaa Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed (CXDS) wuxuu noqday mid ku fashilmay maydaanka dhulka sababo la xiriira kala qeybsanaan, hoggaan la’aan, iyo musuq nidaamsan, Sidoo kale ciidanku wuxuu gabi ahaanba ku burburay dagaaladii uu la galay Al-Shabaab kadib gulufkii colaadeed ee Madaxweyne Xasan Sheikh uu ku qaaday Al-Shabaab bartamihii sanadkii 2022,  haddana ma jirto guuto ciidan ah oo dagaal la gali karta Al-Shabaab sida uu sheegay mid kamid ah madaxweynayaashii dalka soo maray.

Dagaalkii lagula jiray Al‑Shabaab halkii laga soo afjari lahaa, wuxuu galay marxalad daba-dheer, iyadoo Al-Shabaab ay si tartiib tartiib ah ugu soo siqayso Muqdisho. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in Dowladda Federaalka aysan awood u lahayn ilaalinta xudunta qaranka, taas oo ah shuruudda koowaad ee jiritaanka dawlad casri ah.

3. Khilaafka Siyaasadeed iyo Daalka Beesha Caalamka.

Khilaafka joogtada ah ee u dhexeeya Dowladda Federaalka iyo dowlad-goboleedyada ayaa curyaamiyay nidaamkii Dowladnimo, kana dhigay mid ku shaqeeya is-qabqabsi siyaasadeed halkii uu ka ahaan lahaa nidaam wada shaqayn ah. 

Musuqmaasuqa baahsan ee DFS wuxuu sababay in deeq-bixiyeyaasha reer Galbeedku ay lumiyaan kalsoonidii ay ku qabeen hannaanka hadda jira.

Daalkaas waxaa sii xoojiyay xaaladda cakiran ee ka taagan caalamka: 

● Yurub oo ku mashquulsan dagaalka Ukraine, 

● Maraykanka oo wajahaya cadaadis istiraatiijiyeed oo kaga imanaya Shiinaha, 

●  Itoobiya oo ka gudubtay marxalad awood goboleed una dhow xaalad tabar-darro ah, qarkana u saaran in ay burburto, tabarteeda maantana aysan ahayn tabartii ay lahayd sanadkii 2006-dii markii ay si xoog ah oo gardaro ah ay ku soo gashay soomaaliya.

● Isbeddelladii ka dhacay Kabul iyo Dimishiq waxay mar kale muujiyeen in reer Galbeedku aysan mar walba diyaar u ahayn inay difaacaan dowlado daciif ah.

4. Somaliland iyo Dib-u-Habeynta Istiraatiijiyadda Reer Galbeedka.

Marka dhammaan qodobadan la isu geeyo, waxa soo baxaya in koonfurta Soomaaliya ay si isa soo taraysa ugu sii siqayso gacanta Al-Shabaab, halka quwadaha reer Galbeedku ay u baahan yihiin (anchors) siyaasad amni oo lagu ilaaliyo danahooda Geeska Afrika. sidaas ayayna Somaliland  ku noqotay doorasho macquul ah.

Koonfurta Soomaaliya waxaa dul hoganaysa daruur aan si fudud loo saadaalin karin waxa ay dajin doonto. Sida muuqata, reer Galbeedku waxay muujinayaan niyad-jab iyo daal, maadaama ay muddo dheer ku bixiyeen waqti iyo dhaqaale badan taageeridda dowladda taagta-daran oo aan weli yeelan awood buuxda iyo xasillooni waarta. 

Reer Galbeedku weli waxay Soomaaliya ka leeyihiin dano dhaqaale iyo mid istiraatiiji,  sidaas darteed waxay u baahan yihiin maamul ay aqoonsan yihiin oo u noqda ciwaan sharciyeyn (legitimacy) u sameeya danahaas. Ujeedadu waa in aanay danahaasi lumin, isla markaana ay hesho qaab ay u sii joogteeyaan saamayntooda, iyagoo ku xalaashanaya heshiisyadaas ,kheyraadka dhulka Soomaaliyeed “sharciyad” ay iyagu aqbaleen.

Sidaas darteed, ictiraafka uu Gumaystaha Israil siiyey Somaliland, ma aha mid ku dhisan dareen qaranimo ama mid xambaarsan xiriir taariikheed, balse waa heshiis ah dano is dhaafsi, waxay doonayaan in Ictiraafka badalkiisa ay ku helaan ogolaansho dowlad sharciyeysan si ay u adeegsadaan dhulka iyo badda, iyadoo lagu beddelanayo ilaalin, taageero diblomaasiyadeed, iyo aqoonsi caalami ah.

Somaliland, sida muuqata waxay noqon doontaa meel lamid ah sida ay hadda tahay xerada Xalane ee Muqdishu, balse haysta ictiraaf, taas oo noqon doonta god ay iskugu aruuraan dhammaan shisheeyaha danaha kaleh soomaaliya.

Ictiraafka Somaliland ma ahan mid ku eg Israa’iil, mana aha dhacdo kadis ah. Waa natiijo ka dhalatay fashilka dawladnimo ee Soomaaliya, daalka beesha caalamka, iyo baahida quwadaha waaweyn ee ah in ay dib u qaabeeyaan istiraatiijiyaddooda Geeska Afrika. 

Aragtideyda gaarka ah, ictiraafkani wuxuu u taagan yahay bilow isbeddel caalami ah, halkii uu ka ahaan lahaa go’aan gooni ah.

Qofkii fahma arrintan waa inuu ka baxaa akhrinta shucuureed, una guuraa falanqayn nidaamsan oo ku salaysan awood, amni, iyo dano caalami ah, waana halka ay doodda dhabta ahi ka bilaabanayso.

Dhuusamareeb, Galmudug 30, December, 2025: Kusimaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ahna Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe) iyo wafdi uu hogaaminayo ayaa gelinkii dambe ee maanta soo gaaray Magaaladda Dhuusamareeb ee caasimadda Dowlad Goboleedka Galmudug.

Kusimaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ahna Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka waxaa garoonka diyaaradaha ee Magaaladda Dhuusamareeb kusoo dhoweeyey Madaxweynaha Dowlad Goboleedka Galmudug Mudane Axmed Cabdi Kaariye (Qoor-Qoor), wasiiro Iyo xildhibaano heer federaal iyo heer dowlad goboleed iyo sidoo kale qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada Magaaladda Dhuusamareeb.

Kusimaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda ahna Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe) ayaa magaaladda Dhuusamareeb uga qeyb geli doona shirka sanadlaha ah ee madasha aragtida wadaagga ee Heritage, kaas oo dhowaan ka furmi doona Magaaladda Dhuusamareeb ee caasimadda Dowlad Goboleedka Galmudug.

Xilligii Madaxweyne Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo (2017–2022) waxaa Soomaaliya ka dhacay dhacdooyin waaweyn oo saamayn weyn ku yeeshay siyaasadda, amniga, iyo bulshada. Kuwa ugu muhiimsan waxaa ka mid ah:
1. Doorashadii 2017 iyo bilowgii xukunka
Farmaajo waxaa loo doortay madaxweyne Febraayo 8, 2017, doorasho ka dhacday Muqdisho.
Doorashadaas waxay dhalisay rajo weyn oo dadweyne, gaar ahaan dhalinyarada 🇸🇴.

2. La-dagaallanka Al-Shabaab

Dowladda Farmaajo waxay xoogga saartay dagaalka ka dhanka ah Al-Shabaab.
Ciidamada xoogga dalka iyo AMISOM (markaas) ayaa qaaday hawlgallo militari, inkastoo weerarro waaweyn ay weli dhici jireen.

3. Qaraxii Zoobe (Oktoobar 14, 2017)

Qaraxii ugu dhimashada badnaa taariikhda Soomaaliya ayaa ka dhacay isgoyska Zoobe, Muqdisho.
In ka badan 500 qof ayaa ku dhintay, kumannaan kalena way ku dhaawacmeen.
Dhacdadan waxay noqotay masiibo qaran oo murugo weyn dhalisay.

4. Khilaafkii Dowladda Federaalka &
 Dowlad-goboleedyada

Waxaa jiray khilaafyo siyaasadeed oo u dhexeeyay Villa Somalia iyo dowlad-goboleedyada (gaar ahaan Puntland & Jubbaland).
Khilaafyadaas waxay saameeyeen wada-shaqeynta iyo midnimada siyaasadeed.

5. Khilaafkii Ra’iisul Wasaareyaasha

Farmaajo wuxuu la shaqeeyay2 Ra’iisul Wasaare:
Xasan Cali Khayre
Maxamed Xuseen Rooble
Khilaaf siyaasadeed ayaa sababay xil-ka-qaadis iyo isfaham darro, gaar ahaan intii lagu jiray doorashooyinka.

6. Muddo-kororsigii 2021

Baarlamaanka Federaalka ayaa ansixiyay muddo-kordhin 2 sano ah Abriil 2021.
Arrintaas waxay dhalisay:
Banaanbaxyo
Isku dhacyo hubeysan oo ka dhacay Muqdisho
Ugu dambayn, muddo-kordhinta waa laga noqday.

7. Dib u dhaca Doorashooyinka 2020/2021

Doorashooyinkii dalka ayaa si weyn u dib u dhacay.
Khilaaf xooggan ayaa ka dhashay hanaanka doorashada iyo guddiyada.
Ra’iisul Wasaare Rooble ayaa hoggaamiyay geeddi-socodka ugu dambeeya.

8. Isbeddello Diblomaasiyadeed

Soomaaliya waxay:
Ka baxday ku-tiirsanaan xooggan oo shisheeye (sida ay dowladdu sheegtay)
Xoojisay xiriirka dalal ay ka mid yihiin Qatar, Turkiga, iyo Eritrea
Waxaa sidoo kale jiray khilaafyo diblomaasiyadeed, sida kii Kenya.

9. Dhamaadka Xukunka & Doorashadii 2022

Doorasho dadban kadib, May 15, 2022,
 Farmaajo waxaa looga adkaaday doorashada.
Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa dib loogu doortay madaxweyne.

On a day like this in 2016, hundreds of Kenyan soldiers who had just been deployed to the dusty outpost of El Adde, lay dead, after a massive dawn attack on their base by Al Shabaab militants.

And in Nairobi, the government was still trying to get ahead of the embarrassing defeat by denials and gaslighting.

As the survivors from the attack slowly came out of their hiding positions, they helped to gather their dead and wounded, while AMISOM and Kenyan troops were trying their best to reach the sacked base; fighting one ambush after the other.

In total, over one hundred Kenyan troops were killed in the attack, some dying months after surviving the catastrophe due to PTSD symptoms.

By all indications, the attack exposed the inherent weaknesses in our military establishment, as well as the chaotic AMISOM military structure.

For starts, the location and construction of the base was off. It's defenses were so porous that it was no brainer as to how the base was breached quite easily by AS militants after the initial car bomb detonated.

Then the failure to act on Intelligence reports about the massing of AS in the vicinity of the location, especially the Saleh Al Nabhan brigade of the Al Shabaab, which meant an attack was about to happen.

By the way, the Nabhan brigade is responsible for many of the attacks on AMISOM bases, and it is named after a Kenyan commander of Al Shabaab, Saleh Ali Saleh Al Nabhan, who was killed by US troops in a dawn raid dubbed Operation Celestial Balance in 2009.

Plus, there was a previous pattern set by AS when they had overrun AMISOM bases before: massing of fighters, destruction of communication masts (preventing any call for assistance), and the slow withdrawal of local support forces (meaning they had received prior warning of the attack).

All these were fulfilled on the day of the attack on the El Adde base.

However, no action was taken to prepare defenses by the camp commander on January 14. But he was new to the land after having deployed with his company a few days earlier after the new year.

But it was the denials and gaslighting from the military top brass as well as the political leadership that was the icing on the cake of incompetence.

Who can forget the anemic explanation from the CDF Mwathethe about why KDF choppers couldn't mount a rescue attempt on the base due to anti aircraft guns around the area?

Like they couldn't use fighter jets to neutralize them to clear the area for the low flying attack helicopters to swoop in on the raiders?

Or the denials about the actual number of losses, which includes the missing in action and prisoners of war? Anyone who tried to contradict the government line faced persecution, like journalist Yassin Juma.

Were it not for the AS propaganda film that showed how they attacked and ransacked the base, and captured Kenyan soldiers and who are still in captivity ten years later, we might have bought the government line.

They held the line of denial even in the face of evidence that showed the scale of devastation on the base.

And despite spacing out the burials of the dead so that the public won't track the body count, the number still reached 150 by the end of 2016, and thus confirming the allegations that El Adde was a disaster.

That attack also shattered the myth of our military prowess too. We were all sold the story of our professional military, especially after the impressive capture of Kismayu. And the incorruptible KDF which couldn't be attacked like the UPDF.

Well, the events of January 15 showed otherwise.

It forced us to ask those pertinent questions on why the government still insisted on carrying on with the occupation of Somalia in the face of those setbacks.

And the neglect of Kenyan POWs in Somalia is quite telling too. Ten years later, four chiefs of defense forces, and two commanders in chief, it seems no one is bothered at all to try and bring them home.

Like many before, the POWs have been left to rot in the hands of Al Shabaab.

Guddiga Doorashooyinka Uganda ayaa shaaciyay natiijooyin hordhac ah oo muujinaya in madaxweynaha talada haya, Yoweri Museveni, uu hoggaaminayo doorashadii madaxtinimo ee dalkaasi ka dhacday shalay. Sida uu guddigu sheegay, Museveni ayaa helay 76.25% codadka la tiriyay ilaa hadda, iyadoo natiijooyinkan laga helay ku dhowaad kala bar goobaha codbixinta ee dalka oo dhan.

Guddiga Doorashooyinka ayaa intaas ku daray in tirinta codadku ay weli socoto, isla markaana natiijooyinka kama dambaysta ah la filayo in la shaaciyo marka la dhammeeyo hubinta dhammaan codadka laga soo ururiyay gobollada kala duwan. Doorashadan ayaa lagu qabtay jawi ay si dhow ula socdeen warbaahinta iyo kormeerayaal maxalli ah iyo kuwo caalami ah, iyadoo ay jireen hadallo is-daba-joog ah oo ka imanaya xisbiyada mucaaradka oo ku saabsan hannaanka doorashada.

Mas’uuliyiinta Uganda Electoral Commission ayaa ugu baaqay dhammaan dhinacyada siyaasadda inay sugaan natiijooyinka rasmiga ah, kana fogaadaan tallaabo kasta oo keeni karta qalalaase, iyagoo adkeeyay in habraacyada sharciga ah si buuxda loo raacay.

Boss King  Madaxweynaha Dowladda goboleedka Galmudug, Axmed Cabdi Kaariye (Qoorqoor), ayaa sharaxaad ka bixiyey khudbad uu jeediyey oo ku saabsan muhiimadda ay leedahay in Laascaanood laga hirgeliyo xarumo rasmi ah oo ay ku shaqeeyaan hay’adaha Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya.

Madaxweyne Qoorqoor ayaa sheegay in codsigiisu uu salka ku hayo xoojinta joogitaanka dowladda dhexe, gaarsiinta adeegyada aasaasiga ah ee shacabka, iyo adkeynta midnimada qaranka. Wuxuu xusay in reer Waqooyi Bari ay leeyihiin taariikh dheer oo ku suntan dowladnimo, halgan iyo door muuqda oo ay ka qaateen dhismaha Soomaaliya, taas oo ka dhigaysa in ay mudan yihiin in hay’adaha federaalka si buuxda uga howlgalaan deegaannadooda.

Wuxuu adkeeyey in wada-shaqeyntaasi ay ku dhisan tahay is-ixtiraam, is-gacan-qabsi iyo danta guud ee dalka.

Ugu dambeyn, Madaxweyne Qoorqoor ayaa ku boorriyey Dowladda Federaalka, oo uu hoggaamiyo Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, in ay qaaddo tallaabooyin wax ku ool ah oo lagu dardargelinayo furitaanka hay’adaha federaalka ee Laascaanood, si loo xoojiyo dowlad-dhiska, loo helo xasillooni waarta, loona dardargeliyo horumarka gobollada Waqooyi Bari

The BATTLE OF El ADDE TOOK PLACE ON 15 JANUARY 2016. 

★ Al-Shabaab militants launched an attack on a Kenyan-run AMISOM army base in the town of El Adde, Gedo, Somalia. 

– It remains the deadliest attack on the African Union Mission to Somalia and is the Kenya Defence Forces (KDF) largest defeat since independence in 1963. 

– Al-Shabaab militants launched a surprise assault on a Kenyan-run AMISOM army base in El Adde, Gedo region, Somalia. The attack resulted in significant casualties, with estimates suggesting between 141 to 200 Kenyan Defence Forces (KDF) soldiers k!lled, including all officers.

– On 15 January 2016, at 6:30 a.m before morning prayers, a suicide bomber detonated his explosive laden armoured personnel carrier to the front gate to an AMISOM garrison base in El-Adde, Gedo, Somalia. 

– The base compound housed a company of men belonging to both the 5th and 9th Kenya Rifles.Both Kenyan Rifle Battalions were detached to the El-Adde base only two weeks beforehand.The total size of the garrison that day has been generally put at around 600 Kenyan troops presen

– The massive blast damaged the command and communications buildings, as well as an armory and fuel depots of the base, killing dozens of soldiers. 

– The attack caught Kenyan troops unprepared and asleep. At approximately 7:30 a.m, the battle lasted for more than one hour of fierce fighting,until Kenyan troops were routed from the base and fled into the dense bush pursued by Al Shabaab militants.

– A neighboring Somali National Army (SNA) base located 600 meters away from the AMISOM base, was empty of troops, who allegedly left and were warned hours before the attack, per the Kenyan military.

– Al-Katāi’b Media associated with Al-Shabaab, released a 48-minute-long propaganda video showing the bodies of at least 63 dead KDF soldiers and captured military hardware, including several tanks and long range field artillery.They later claimed to have killed over 600 Kenyan troops.

Madaxweyne Dr. Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, waxaa markii ugu horreysay loo doortay xilka madaxweynenimo 10-kii Sebtembar 2012. Muddada xilka madaxweynaha, sida uu qeexayay Dastuurka Federaalka ee waqtigaas jiray, waxay ahayd shan (5) sano. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa markii dambe wax ka beddelay muddada xilka, una beddelay afar (4) sano. Madaxweynaha ayaa aqbalay kuna shaqeeyay nidaamkaas wax-ka-beddelka ah, kaas oo dhaqan galay intii uu xilka hayay.
Madaxweyne Dr. Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud ayaa mar labaad loo doortay xilka madaxweynenimo 15-kii May 2022. Inkastoo muddada xilka markii hore loo asteeyay afar (4) sano, haddana Golaha Shacabka iyo Aqalka Sare ee Baarlamaanka Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa cod aqlabiyad ah ku ansixiyay in muddada xilka loo kordhiyo shan (5) sano. Madaxweynaha ayaa si rasmi ah u saxiixay go’aankaas, waxaana daabacaaddiisa Wargeyska Rasmiga ah ay ka dhigtay mid sharci ahaan dhaqan-gal ah oo waajib ah inta uu socdo xilligan xilka.
Baarlamaanka Federaalka Soomaaliya waa hay’adda sharci-dejinta ee mas’uulka ka ah dejinta iyo ansixinta sharciyada dalka. Sharci kasta oo uu Baarlamaanku ansixiyo wuxuu noqdaa mid dhaqan-gal ah marka uu Madaxweynaha saxiixo. Sidaas darteed, muddada xilka Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud waxay ku eg tahay 15-ka May 2027, haddii Alle idmo.

Shirkan ayaa si qoto dheer looga hadlay xaaladda abaareed ee ka jirta guud ahaan deegaanada Koonfur Galbeed, iyo sidii gargaar degdeg ah loo gaarsiin lahaa dadka ay abaaruhu saameeyeen, gaar ahaan dadka nugul ee ku dhaqan miyiga iyo magaalooyinka.

Sidoo kale, Madaxweyne Laftagareen ayaa faray Guddiga Gurmadka Abaaraha in ay dardargeliyaan dadaallada gargaarka, isla markaana ay la shaqeeyaan hay’adaha maxalliga ah iyo kuwa caalamiga ah si gargaar waara loo gaarsiiyo dadka ay dhibaatadu saameysay.

Warbixin: Xaqiiqda La Rogay Ee Jabuuti Oo Aqlabiyadda Ay Maamulaan Dad Laga Tiro Badan Yahay.

Dadka Canfarta ah waxay ka kooban yihiin qiyaastii 60%–70% dadka reer Jabuuti waxayna ku nool yihiin saddex ka mid ah shanta gobol ee dalka. Haddana, inkastoo ay aad u badan yihiin dadka deegaanka, haddana si nidaamsan ayay uga fog yihiin awoodda, siyaasad ahaan way ka fog yihiin, waxaana loo diiday inay wax door ah oo macno leh ka ciyaaraan maamulidda dalkooda.

Awoodda Jabuuti waxay ku urursan tahay gacanta tiro yar oo yar, kaligii-taliyihii talada hayay, Ismaaciil Cumar Geelle, wuxuu ka soo jeedaa qabiilka Ciise, oo ah qabiil ka tirsan Soomaalida oo ku nool wax ka yar 20% dhulka Jabuuti wuxuuna matalaa qiyaastii 10% dadweynaha. Marka laga soo tago Ciise, kooxaha kale ee laga tirada badan yahay - Isaaq, Samaroon, iyo bulshooyinka Carabta - oo isku darkoodu yahay 20%. Kooxda Ciise ee laga tirada badan yahay ee dawladdu waxay xukumaysay Jabuuti, halka dadka ugu badan ee Canfarta iyo qowmiyadaha kale ee laga tirada badan yahay lagu riixay dhinaca siyaasadda.

Tan iyo markii ay xornimada qaadatay, Jabuuti waxaa gacanta ku hayay qoys keliya oo aan dawladda ula dhaqmin sidii qaran, laakiin ah hanti gaar ah, wixii soo bixi karay oo noqon karay waddan deggan oo barwaaqo ah ayaa si ula kac ah loo qoday, taasoo loo beddelay jamhuuriyad muus ah oo ay ku sii kordheen caburin, taageero, iyo kirada shisheeye.

Burburkan ayaa sii xoogaystay markii nidaamku uu Jabuuti u beddelay hanti boqortooyo, wiilasha iyo gabdhaha kaligii-taliyihiina ay ku jiraan jagooyinka ugu xasaasiga badan uguna awoodda badan dowladda, halka xaasaskooda iyo qaraabadooda dhow ay ku dhex milmeen hay'adaha siyaasadda, militariga, iyo amniga. Dowladda si buuxda ayaa loo qabsaday—hay'adaheeda oo laga qaaday madaxbannaanida oo dib loogu habeeyay si loo dammaanad qaado badbaadada hal qabiil iyo hal qoys, halkii ay u adeegi lahaayeen danta dadweynaha.

Cadaalad-darrada taariikhiga ah ee noocaas ah ma sii jiri karto si aan xad lahayn, Bilihii ugu dambeeyay, dhaqdhaqaaqa xoraynta Canfarta ayaa sii kordhiyay weerarrada bartilmaameedka ah ee ka dhanka ah ciidamada taliska, iyagoo si toos ah ula dagaallamaya kalitalisnimo neef qabatin ah oo ku dhisan ka-saarid, cabsi, iyo rogaal-celin bulsho. Iska-caabbintoodu waxay muujinaysaa baahida sii kordheysa ee lagu doonayo in lagu kala diro xukunka dadka laga tirada badan yahay ee ku salaysan kalitalisnimada iyo in Jabuuti laga soo celiyo burburkii kalitalisnimada—soo celinta sharafta, matalaadda, iyo dimuqraadiyadda dhabta ah ee qaran ay muddo dheer afduub ku haysteen dad yar oo mudnaan leh.

Ciidanka Hay'ada Nabad Sugida Iyo Sirdoonka Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya Ee Magaalada Baraawe Caasimadda Dowlada Koonfur Galbeed ayaa Howlgal Balaaran oo lagu sugaayo Amniga ka sameeyey Gudaha Magaalada . 

Howlgalka Oo Hogaaminayey Taliyaha Nabadsugida Baraawe  Cumar  Abdi yaanlow ayaa Ciidanka waxay ka fuliyeen Gudaha Magaalada iyo Wadooyinka Soo Gala waxaana Ciidanka ay baarayeen gawaarida isticmaala Wadooyinka iyo Dadkaba. 

Cumar Cabdi Yaanlow Taliyaha Nabadsugida  Ee Magaalada Baraawe ayaa amar ku bixiyey in 12saac  maqrabnimo wixii ka danbeeyo Magaalada soo gali karin mooto feekon Cidii amarkaasi jabisana ciqaab la kulmi doonto.

Waxaa magaalada Nayroobi ka dhici doona kulan muhiim ah oo ay yeelanayaan xubnaha Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya, kaas oo la filayo in laga soo saaro go’aan masiiri ah oo ku aaddan gogoshii wada-hadalka ee ay u fidisay Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya.

Aqbalaadda Gogosha iyo Culeyska Jira
Ilo xog-ogaal ah ayaa Somali Stream u xaqiijiyey in inta badan xubnaha Goluhu uu xaglinayaan dhanka aqbalaadda gogoshaas. Isbeddelka mowqifka Golaha ayaa yimid kaddib markii ay arkeen soo-dhoweynta ballaaran ee beesha caalamku u muujisay wada-hadallka Dowladu ku dhawaaqday iyo iyadoo la tixgelinayo marxaladda adag ee dalku marayo oo u baahan xal siyaasadeed.
Isku-duubnida Golaha iyo Xubnaha Diiddan
Sida ay xogtu tilmaamayso, inta badan xubnaha Golaha Mustaqbalka ayaa isku raacsan in fursad la siiyo gogosha dowladda. Inkasta oo ay jiraan xubno ka tirsan hoggaanka GMS oo weli dareen diidmo ah ka qaba qorshahan, haddana waxaa muuqata in la isku raacay inaan la lumin fursadda wada-hadalka, iyadoo la door biday rabitaanka aqlabiyadda xubnaha Golaha oo u hamuun qaba isu-soo-dhowaansho.
Shuruudaha iyo Guddiga Farsamada
Wararka hordhaca ah ayaa sheegaya in marka uu kulanka GMS soo dhammaado, la filayo in la magacaabo Guddi Farsamo. Guddigan ayaa loo xilsaari doonaa inay dowladda kala xaajoodaan;
• In marka hore laga heshiiyo ajandaha rasmiga ah, goobta iyo waqtiga kulanka.
2.In wada-hadalku uu ahaado mid toos u dhex mara Dowladda Federaalka iyo Golaha    Mustaqbalka oo kaliya, iyadoo meesha laga saarayo kulan furan oo dhinacyo badan ah.
Go’aankan oo la filayo in laga soo saaro shirka Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliyeed ee Nayroobi ayaa dhabbaha u xaari doona waji cusub oo wada-hadal ah, kaas oo meesha ka saaraya ismari-waagii siyaasadeed ee muddooyinkii u dambeeyey ka dhex taagnaa dhinacyada siyaasadda Soomaaliya. Waxaana uu kusoo beegmayaa xilli uu dhammaad joogo muddada xilhaynta hay’adaha dastuuriga ah, Madaxtooyadunu ku madhquulsan tahay muddo kordhin iyo dastuur samaysasho.

Hase yeeshee, haddii xeerarka iyo dastuurka si sax ah loogu shaqayn lahaa, ma jiri lahayn ka-qaybgalka share-rarka iyo maamulka ganacsiyo mudada uu xilka la hayo masulku.

Taariikhda maamul ee deegaannada Hirshabelle waxay soo martay marxalado kala duwan, balse muddadii dheerayd ee uu talada hayay Cali Guudlaawe—isagoo soo ahaa Guddoomiyaha Shabeellaha Dhexe, Madaxweyne kuxigeen, iyo ugu dambayn Madaxweynaha Hirshabelle—waxay noqotay mid lagu xasuusan doono dib-u-dhac, barakicin, iyo xaalufinta kheyraadka dadka iyo deegaanka.

​Hoggaanka Cali Guudlaawe wuxuu ku dhisnaa muddadaas dheer nidaam aan daryeel u lahayn dadka iyo Deegaanka ee ah dhamaan dad wada nugul. Halkii laga filayay horumar iyo adeeg bulsho, shacabku waxay dhaxleen:
​Maamul-xumo iyo Musuqmaasuq: Waxaa muuqata in kheyraadkii loogu talagalay horumarinta deegaanka loo adeegsaday dano gaar ah, taas oo keentay in kaabayaashii dhaqaalaha iyo adeegyadii asaasiga ahaa ay gabi ahaanba dumaan.

​Muddada uu xilka hayay, kumanaan qoys ayaa ku barakacay colaado iyo abaarro aan loo helin gurmad dhab ah, halka amnigu uu noqday mid faraha ka baxay oo shacabku aysan haysan kalsooni buuxda.

Deegaanka Hirshabelle oo caan ku ahaa waxsoosaarka iyo khayraadka dabiiciga ah, waxaa lagu sameeyay xaalufin aan loo meel deyin, iyadoo aysan jirin qorshe mustaqbalka fog loogu daryeelayo deegaankaas hodanka ah.

​Ma Dhici Doontaa "Shaxdii 2020-kii"?
​Waxaa la wada xasuustaa doorashadii 2020-kii, markii uu Cali Guudlaawe ka helay dowladdii Farmaajo waddo furan oo uu kaligiis ku tartamay, isagoo isku caano-shubay kursiga. Maanta, isagoo rajeynaya inuu markale isla wadadaas u maro dowladda Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh, waxaa cad in xaaladdu ka duwan tahay sidii hore.

​Dowladda Federaalka ah ee maanta iyo shacabka Hirshabelle-ba waxay aad uga feejigan yihiin in fursad labaad la siiyo shakhsi aan u naxeyn dadka iyo deegaanka. Maqnaanshaha aqoonta hoggaamineed iyo dhibka uu ku hayo jiritaanka dadka deegaanka ayaa ah cashar laga bartay wixii hore u dhacay.

​"Hirshabelle uma baahna hoggaan danayste ah, waxay u baahan tahay maamul hufan oo u adeega dadka, dalkana ku soo dabaala nidaamka dawladnimada Soomaaliyeed ee saxda ah."

​Baaq ku Socda Shacabka iyo Waxgaradka
​Waa markii ay midoobi lahaayeen Culumada, Siyaasiyiinta, Aqoonyahanka, Dhallinyarada, Haweenka, iyo Odayaasha Dhaqanka si looga hortago in markale lagu sirmo ballanqaadyo been ah. Hirshabelle waxay u baahan tahay dhiig cusub iyo dad u damqanaya shacabka aadka u nugul ee muddo dheer tabaaleysnaa.

​Gunaanad:
Waqtigii dhiig-miirashada iyo boobka hantida dadweynaha waa inuu dhammaado. Shacabka Hirshabelle waa inay u diyaar-garoobaan maamul hufan oo daacad ah, kaas oo ka turjumaya rabitaankooda dhabta ah, kana fog eex, musuq iyo mas'uuliyad darro.

WQ. Asad Hassan Mohamed

#ALERT: Jubbaland Rejects Federal Justice Ministry Statement

The Ministry of Justice and Constitutional Affairs of Jubbaland State has dismissed as invalid a statement issued earlier today by the Ministry of Justice and Constitutional Affairs of the Federal Government of Somalia.

In a brief response, Jubbaland authorities said the federal ministry’s announcement has no legal basis and does not apply to the Jubbaland administration. They emphasized that Jubbaland remains committed to its constitutional mandate and governance responsibilities within the federal system.

The Federal Government’s statement, released earlier on the same day, addressed matters related to justice and constitutional affairs, though Jubbaland officials argue it was issued without proper consultation and oversteps federal authority.

Tensions between Somalia’s Federal Government and some federal member states have periodically surfaced, particularly over constitutional interpretation, division of powers, and governance processes.

FASHILKA MUCAARADKA: Is-hortaaggii Dastuurka ee Golaha Shacabka oo lagu guuleystay! 🇸🇴⚡
​MOGADISHU — Waxaa maanta fashil ku dhamaaday isku day ay qaar ka mid ah xildhibaanada mucaaradka ah ku rabeen inay ku curyaamiyaan shaqada Golaha Shacabka, xilli loo fadhiyey ansixinta iyo qeybinta ajandaha wax ka bedelka Dastuurka Federaalka Soomaaliya.
​Maxaa ka dhacay gudaha Golaha? Xildhibaano ka tirsan mucaaradka, oo u muuqda kuwo ka soo horjeeda horumarka sharciga ah ee dalka, ayaa billaabay olole buuq iyo rabshad ah. Waxay adeegsadeen firimbi iyo qaylo si ay u hakiyaan guddoonka baarlamaanka, balse adkeysiga guddoonka iyo rabitaanka aqlabiyadda ayaa ka xoog batay kooxdaas fowdada wadaday.
​Dhacdadii Jeex-jeexista Ajandaha: Markii laga guuleystay ee la ansixiyey ajandaha, xildhibaanada mucaaradka oo dareemay quus iyo fashil siyaasadeed, ayaa tallaabo laga xumaado qaaday iyagoo jeex-jeexay nuqulladii ajandaha ee loo qeybiyey. Tani waxay calaamad u tahay heerka ay gaarsiisan tahay mas'uuliyad darrada kooxda doonaysa inay dalka dib u dhigto.
​Farriinta Farhan Intel (Dhaleeceyn): Waa ayaan darro weyn in xildhibaan loo doortay inuu matalo shacabka uu isticmaalo firimbi iyo falal fowdo ah si uu u curyaamiyo masiirka dalka. Jeex-jeexista waraaqaha ajandaha ma ahan mucaaradnimada ee waa sumcad-xumo loo soo jiiday qaranka. Mucaaradku waa inay ra'yigooda ku soo bandhigaan dood aqooneed, ee ma ahan inay golaha ka dhigaan meel lagu dhex foodhiyo.
​Maxaa xiga? Guusha maanta waxay dhabaha u xaartay in maalmaha soo socda la galo doodda dhabta ah iyo ansixinta afar cutub oo ka mid ah dastuurka, kuwaas oo muhiim u ah dhammaystira dowladnimada Soomaaliya.
​Su'aal: Sidee u aragtaa dhaqanka xildhibaanada adeegsaday firimbida iyo kuwa jeex-jeexay ajandaha? Ma tahay habka ugu habboon ee lagu muujiyo ra'yi kala duwanaanshaha?

Dhacdadani waxay i xasuusinaysaa mid la mid ah oo dhacday May 2010, ka dib markii qaar ka mid ah xildhibaannada Baarlamaankii Ku-meel-gaarka ahaa oo xukuumadda ka tirsanaa iyo kuwo taageersanaa ay u diideen Aadan Madoobe in uu shir guddoomiyo Golaha Shacabka.

Waqtigaas anigu waxaan ka tirsanaa Golaha, balse kama mid ahayn xukuumadda. Muxaafid iyo mucaaradba, dhammaan xildhibaannadii afka ayaa gacanta la saaray. Maalin kaddib ayuu is casilay, haseyeeshee xukuumaddii waxba iskama beddelin, shaqadeedii ayayna sii wadatay.

Aadan Madoobe waa shaqsi ku caan baxay indho-adayg sharci-jebin, ku-takri-falidda xeerarka iyo habraacyada Golaha, iyo ka been sheegidda kooramka iyo codaynta Baarlamaanka. WAR: Turkiga & Soomaaliya: Iskaashi Ciidan oo Isbedel Keenaya

Tan iyo markii ay dhacday ceyrintii Imaaraadka iyo aqoonsigii Israel ee Somaliland, iskaashiga milatari ee u dhexeeya Turkiga iyo Soomaaliya ayaa yeeshay saameyn weyn oo amni iyo siyaasadeed. 

Iskaashigan istiraatiijiga ah ayaa u oggolaanaya Soomaaliya in ay awood milatari ku xoojiso gudaha dalka, isla markaana ka hortagto kooxaha nabad-diidka iyo argagixisada.

Turkiga ayaa Soomaaliya u keenay diyaarado dagaal, qalab milatari oo kala duwan, iyo raadaaro casri ah, kuwaas oo lagu la socon karo badaha iyo berriba.

Dalka waxaa loogu furey saldhigyo tababar oo ballaaran, oo ka kooban qalab casri ah, diyaarado dagaal, iyo raadaaro, si ciidamada Soomaaliya loogu siiyo tababar buuxa oo xirfadeed.

Ciidamada kala duwan ee xoogga Soomaaliya, gaar ahaan kuwa badda, cirka iyo dhulka, ayaa lagu tababaraa saldhigyadaas.

Tababarradu waxay diiradda saarayaan la dagaallanka kooxaha nabad-diidka iyo argagixisada, ilaalinta xeebaha iyo khayraadka badda, iyo xoojinta awoodda ciidamada gudaha si loo taageero howlaha bini’aadminimo iyo maamul wanaagga. 

Iskaashigan milatari wuxuu socdaa in ka badan 15 sano, isagoo ku lug lahaa dhinacyada milatari, bini’aadminimo, iyo waxbarasho.

Tan iyo markii la saxeexay heshiisyo difaac oo hawada iyo badda ah, Turkiga wuxuu sii xoojiyay joogitaankiisa, isagoo diyaariyay saldhigyo cusub iyo qalab casri ah. 

Saldhigyadaas ayaa u sahlaya Soomaaliya in ay si buuxda u maamuli karto amniga gudaha, isla markaana ka hortagto kooxaha argagixisada iyo burcad-badeedda.

Khubarada amniga ayaa tilmaamaya in iskaashigan uu leeyahay saameyn istiraatiiji ah oo gobolka ka dhex abuuri karta xasillooni, iyadoo Soomaaliya ay awood u yeelaneyso ilaalinta dhulkeeda, xeebaha, iyo khayraadka muhiimka ah.

Dhanka kale, aqoonsiga Israel ee Somaliland ayaa sii murjiyay xaaladda, iyadoo Turkey iyo Soomaaliya ay si wadajir ah uga soo horjeesteen arrintan.

Dowladda Soomaaliya waxay ku adkaysaneysaa midnimada iyo xasilloonida dalka, halka Turkey ay si cad uga digtay in ficil kasta oo ku saabsan aqoonsiga Somaliland uu khatar gelinayo midnimada Soomaaliya iyo xasilloonida gobolka.
