Muuqaalkan ayaa ah Falanqayntan ay sameeyeen laba weriye oo u dhashay dalka 𝗔𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗮, 𝗡𝗲𝗶𝗹 iyo 𝗘𝗿𝗶𝗻 kuwaas oo soo saara barnaamijka la yidhaahdo "𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝘂𝗯 𝗧𝗲𝘀𝘁". 𝗠𝗮𝘅𝗮𝘆 𝘂 𝗳𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗾𝗮𝘆𝗻𝗮𝘆𝗮𝗮𝗻? Ujeeddadoodu waa inay dadka u dhashay Australia iyo dunida kaleba u sharraxaan gobollada inta badan laga sheekayn, balse leh muhiimad weyn oo dhinaca ammaanka iyo dhaqaalaha ah. Waxay Somaliland u arkaan tusaale cajiib ah oo muujinaya dal dhistay dimuqraadiyad iyadoo dunidu iska indho-tirayso.
Labada qof ee wada hadlaya waa:
★ 𝗡𝗲𝗶𝗹: Waa weriye rug-caddaa ah oo inta badan ka faallooda arrimaha siyaasadda iyo taariikhda. Isagu waa kan sharraxaya halka uu Geeska Afrika ku yaallo, taariikhda Itoobiya, iyo farqiga u dhexeeya gumaysigii Ingiriiska (Somaliland) iyo kii Talyaaniga (Soomaaliya).
★ 𝗘𝗿𝗶𝗻: Waa weriye khabiir ku ah arrimaha caalamiga ah, gaar ahaan gobolka Indo-Pacific iyo Bariga Dhexe. Waxay barnaamijka ku soo kordhisay xogta ku saabsan xidhiidhka Israa’iil iyo Somaliland, iyadoo sheegtay in markii hore ay la soo xidhiidheen dad xog-ogaal ah oo arrintan u kuur-galayay.
Falanqayntani waxay si qoto dheer u eegaysaa isbeddellada juquraafi-siyaasadeed ee ku cusub Geeska Afrika, iyadoo diiradda lagu saarayo doorka sii kordhaya ee Somaliland. In kasta oo aanay haysan aqoonsi caalami ah, Somaliland waxay ku guulaysatay inay dhisato nidaam dimuqraaddi ah oo ka yimid xaggiisa hoose (bottom-up), iyadoo aan helin kaalmo dibadeed oo la buunbuuniyo, taas oo ka dhigtay mid ka mid ah dawladaha ugu xasilloon gobolka.

𝗤𝗼𝗱𝗱𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗠𝘂𝗵𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗸𝗮 𝗮𝗵:
𖣔 𝗜𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗷𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗕𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝘀: Waxaa la falanqaynayaa sababta ay Israa’iil iyo quwadaha kale u danaynayaan Somaliland, gaar ahaan sidii loo xakamayn lahaa halista Xuutiyiinta Yemen iyo sugidda marin-biyoodka muhiimka ah ee Gacanka Cadmeed.
𖣔 𝗟𝗼𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗞𝗵𝗮𝘆𝗿𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗸𝗮: Warbixintu waxay taabanaysaa xiisadda ka dhalatay 𝗕𝗶𝘆𝗼-𝘅𝗶𝗱𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗜𝘁𝗼𝗼𝗯𝗶𝘆𝗮 iyo saamaynta uu ku leeyahay biyaha Niilka ee Masar, taas oo gobolka ka dhigi karta goob ay ku loolamaan quwadaha caalamku.
𖣔 𝗛𝗮𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗗𝗮𝘄𝗹𝗮𝗱𝗻𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗱𝗮: Waxaa la isbarbardhigayaa taariikhda gumeysigii Ingiriiska (Somaliland) iyo kii Talyaaniga (Soomaaliya), iyo sida kala duwanaanshahaas taariikheed uu u saameeyay xidhiidhka labada dhinac iyo madax-bannaanida de facto ee ay Somaliland ku naaloonayso tan iyo 1991.
𖣔 𝗔𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗚𝗲𝗼𝗽𝗼𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀: Waxaa la odorosayaa sida isbeddelka siyaasadda Maraykanka (gaar ahaan xilliga Donald Trump) iyo go'aannada Israa’iil ay u dardargelin karaan aqoonsiga Somaliland, iyadoo loo eegayo danaha amni iyo kuwa dhaqaale. Mawduucani wuxuu muujinayaa in Somaliland aanay ahayn oo kaliya gobol ka tirsan Geeska Afrika, balse ay tahay "nuqul dimuqraaddi ah" oo ku dhex yaal deegaan qalalaase badan, kaas oo hadda noqday fure muhiim u ah ammaanka caalamiga ah iyo loolanka quwadaha waaweyn.

Maxay tahay sababta Geeska Afrika uu si lama filaan ah ugu noqday xuddunta ciyaar weyn oo juquraafi-siyaasadeed (𝗚𝗲𝗼𝗽𝗼𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗚𝗮𝗺𝗲)?
Qaybtan ka mid ah barnaamijka 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝘂𝗯 𝗧𝗲𝘀𝘁, waxaynu ku dhuuxaynaa gobolka uu Galbeedku inta badan iska indho-tiro, balse hadda noqonaya barta xigta ee dunida isku haysato. Waxaynu faaqidaynaa warka layaabka leh ee sheegaya in Israa’iil ay qorshaynayso aqoonsiga 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 dal farsamo ahaan aan "ka jirin" inta badan khariidadaha dunida. Waxaynu eegaynaa sababta tallaabadan istraatiijiyadeed ay ugu xidhan tahay ka hortagga Xuutiyiinta Yemen iyo sugidda amniga Badda Cas.
Sidoo kale, waxaynu sahamineynaa sheekada layaabka leh ee dimuqraadiyadda Somaliland. Iyadoo dunidu meel kale eegayso, ayay dhisteen dawladda ugu dimuqraaddisan Geeska Afrika, iyagoo ka soo bilaabay salka ilaa sare, waliba bilaa gargaar dibadeed.

𝗤𝗼𝗱𝗱𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗞𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗲𝗲 𝗕𝗮𝗿𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗷𝗸𝗮:
✪ 𝗫𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗪𝗲𝗯𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗡𝗶𝗶𝗹: Sidee biyo-xidheenka weyn ee Itoobiya u khatar gelinayaa biyaha Masar, una kicin karaa dagaalka xiga ee khayraadka?
✪ 𝗧𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗶𝗸𝗵𝗱𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮: Laga soo bilaabo gumaysigii ilaa doodaha ku saabsan "Shaaha iyo Chay-ga," kani waa dhuuxid qoto dheer oo ku saabsan Bariga Afrika oo laga yaabo inaadan hore u ogaan inaad u baahnayd.

𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗪𝗲𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗲𝘆𝗮𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮 (𝗡𝗲𝗶𝗹 iyo 𝗘𝗿𝗶𝗻):
Neil: Waxaynu eegaynaa qayb dunida ka mid ah oo aan looga hadlin dalka Australia—waa gobolka loo yaqaan Geeska Afrika. Waa gasiirad-yar oo ku taal Bariga Afrika, kuna yaalaan dalalka Jabuuti, Erateriya, Itoobiya, iyo Soomaaliya. Waxaa xusid mudan in Itoobiya ay tahay mid ka mid ah dalalka tirada yar ee aan waligood la gumaysan. Sidoo kale, halkaas waxaa ka soo bilaabma Webiga Niil (Niilka Cad iyo kan Buluugga ah). Laakiin maxay hadda warka ugu jirtaa?
𝗘𝗿𝗶𝗻: Waa qayb aad u xiiso badan. Labadii bilood ee u dambeeyay waxaa la igu soo celceliyay magaca "Somaliland." Markii aan baadhay, waxaan ogaaday in Israa’iil ay hadal hayso aqoonsigooda. Haddii aad eegto halka ay Somaliland kaga taal khariidada (Gacanka Cadmeed) iyo khayraadka dabiiciga ah ee ay leedahay, waxay leedahay muhiimad weyn oo dhinaca istraatiijiyadda ah, gaar ahaan maadaama ay ka soo horjeeddo dalka Yemen.
𝗡𝗲𝗶𝗹: Haddii aynu u sii dhuuxno Somaliland, taariikh ahaan waxay ahayd boqortooyo jirtay qarniyadii 14-aad iyo 15-aad. Gumaysigii ka dib, Somaliland waxaa maamulayay Ingiriiska, halka Soomaaliya ay maamulayeen Talyaanigu. In kasta oo ay wadaagaan diin iyo dhaqan, haddana waxaa jiray khilaafyo sokeeye. Somaliland hadda waxay leedahay dad ka badan 6.5 milyan, caasimadeeduna waa Hargeysa. Waxay leeyihiin lacag u gaar ah (Shilingka Somaliland) iyo distoor la qoray 2001.
𝗘𝗿𝗶𝗻: Dadka faalleeya siyaasadda waxay leeyihiin sababta koowaad ee Israa’iil u xiisaynayso waa Xuutiyiinta iyo sidii ay gobolkaas saldhig ugu yeelan lahaayeen. Waxaa kale oo jira warar sheegaya in Somaliland ay door ka ciyaari karto qorshayaasha la xidhiidha qaxootiga Reer Gaaza.
𝗡𝗲𝗶𝗹: Waxa ugu xiisaha badani waa in ururka Freedom House uu sheegay in Somaliland ay tahay dalka ugu dimuqraaddisan Geeska Afrika, iyagoo nidaamkooda ka dhistay salka (bottom-up) iyadoon gargaar dibadeed la siin. Tani waxay la macno tahay in qiyamkoodu uu la jaanqaadayo dimuqraadiyadaha reer Galbeedka.
𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗮𝗵𝗮: Barnaamijka waxaa lagu soo xidhay barashada cabitaannada deegaanka:
᯽ 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗮𝗵𝗮: Shaah lagu daray xawaash iyo caano.
᯽ 𝗤𝗮𝗵𝘄𝗼: Bunka Somaliland ee lagu daro sinjibiisha iyo haylka.
᯽ 𝗫𝗮𝗾𝗶𝗶𝗾𝗼 𝗫𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗹𝗲𝗵: Haddii magaca shaaha lagu keeno bad (𝗦𝗲𝗮) waxaa la yidhaahdaa "𝗧𝗲𝗮," haddii dhulka (𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗱) lagu keenona waxaa la yidhaahdaa "𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗶."

𝗚𝗨𝗡𝗔𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗗
Gunaanadka falanqayntan ay sameeyeen weriyeyaasha reer Australia ee barnaamijka 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝘂𝗯 𝗧𝗲𝘀𝘁, waxaa lagu soo koobi karaa saddex qodob oo waaweyn oo muujinaya sababta Somaliland ay hadda u noqotay xuddunta dareenka caalamiga ah:
𝟭. 𝗚𝘂𝘂𝗹 𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗗𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗱𝗮 𝗹𝗮𝗴𝗮 𝗳𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻
Gunaanadku wuxuu iftiiminayaa in Somaliland ay tahay "mucjiso siyaasadeed" oo ka dhex dhalatay gobol qalalaase badan. Iyadoo aan helin aqoonsi caalami ah iyo gargaar dhaqaale oo weyn, haddana waxay ku guulaysatay inay dhisato nidaam dimuqraaddi ah oo ka yimid rabitaanka shacabka, taas oo ka dhigtay mid ka duwan dalal badan oo la aqoonsan yahay balse aan haysan xasilloonidaas.
𝟮. 𝗜𝘀𝗯𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗠𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗔𝘄𝗼𝗼𝗱𝗱𝗮 (𝗚𝗲𝗼𝗽𝗼𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀)
Waxaa lagu soo xidhay in aqoonsiga ay Israa’iil qorshaynayso iyo xiisaha ay Maraykanku u qabaan Somaliland aanay ahayn mid kedis ah, balse ay tahay natiijada ka dhalatay baahida loo qabo xal looga helo khatarta Xuutiyiinta iyo tartanka loogu jiro kantaroolka Badda Cas. Tani waxay Somaliland ka dhigaysaa ciyaaryahan fure u ah amniga caalamiga ah.
𝟯. 𝗧𝗼𝗼𝘀𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗔𝗿𝗮𝗴𝘁𝗶𝗱𝗮 𝗚𝗮𝗹𝗯𝗲𝗲𝗱𝗸𝗮
Weriyeyaashu waxay gunaanadkooda ku qirteen in dadka reer Galbeedka (sida Australia) ay aad u yaryahay aqoonta ay u leeyihiin Geeska Afrika. Waxay ku baaqeen in la joogteeyo barashada gobolladan "la iska indho-tiro" sababtoo ah isbeddellada halkaas ka dhaca waxay saameyn ku leeyihiin guud ahaan xasilloonida adduunka iyo isbeddellada siyaasadeed ee xilliga dambe (sida xilliga Donald Trump).
"Somaliland ma aha oo kaliya meel khariidadda ku taal, waa tusaale muujinaya in dimuqraadiyadu ay ka dhalan karto deegaan kasta haddii salkeeda laga soo dhiso."

Sababta aan u siiyey min shan xubnood waxaa ay tahay, beelaha laga tirada badan yahay waxaa ay halkaasi ka helayaan ugu yaraan halka hadda ay leeyihiin hal xubin.

Dhinaca gobolka Bannaadir, waa caasimaddii dalka oo waxaa ku nool in ka badan 4 milyan oo ruux iyadoon wali si dhab ah loo tirakoobin isla markaana dadkii deegaanka ahaa aysan wali ku soo noqonin waxaan qabaa in 18 xubnood looga dhigo.

Sababtoo ah, sida caadiga ah Muqdisho waxaa ay leedahay 16 degmo sidaas bay ku yeelanayaan 16-ka xubnood, labada kale ee dheeraadka ahna waxaan ugu darey maadaama dadka ku nool ay ka kala yimaadeen gobolada kale ee dalka iyo guud ahaan geyiga Soomaaliyeed baan ugu darey.

Marka 18-kaas la siiyo waa in sida beelaha degan gobolka loogu qaybiyaa iyadoo lagu saleynayo deegaan rasmi wixii ka ahaa 1990-kii wixii ka horeeyey 60 KM oo dhinac kasta ah dadka ku nool ee xoolo dhaqatada ah iyo beeraleyda ayaa lagu tilmaami karaa deegaan ee kama hadlayo dadka ku leh hantida maguurtada ah.

Waayo, hantida ma guurtada ah cid kasta ayaa ku yeelan karta oo waliba waxaa laga yaabaa in ay keenaan doodo siyaasadeed iyo mid amni.

Tan kale, tirada xubnaha GGobolka Benaadir waa soo xulistooda waa in ay ahaataa mid doorasho shacab ah ee aysan noqon mid beeleysan.

Inta laga gaarayo tirakoob rasmi ah dalka oo dhan,18-ka xubnood ee goblka Bannaadir 10 ka mid ah waxaa loo qoondeyn karaa dadka degan ee asalka ah isla markaana ku xeeran hareeraha caasimada, halka 8-da xubnood ee soo hara laga dhigi karo mid Soomaali oo dhan ay ku tartanto.

Guddiga Madaxabannaan Ee Dastuurka iyo labada aqal ee BBaarlamanka Federaalka Soomaaliyaayaa laga rabaa in ay si feejigan u eegaan balse arragtideydan, waxaa ay noqon kartaa mid sax ah ama wax waa laga bedeli karaa.

MUDANAYAASHA LABADA AQAL EE BAARLAMAANKA DALKA OO KA DOODAY CUTUBKA LIXAAD EE DASTUURKA.

Muqdisho-Soomaaliya 15, Febraayo, 2026: Mudanayaasha labada Aqal ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa maanta kulan wadajir ah ku yeeshay xarunta Golaha Shacabka, waxaana shir guddoominayey Guddoomiye kuxigeenka koowaad ee Golaha Aqalka Sare Mudane Cali Shacbaan Ibraahim oo ay wehliyaan Guddoomiye kuxigeenka labaad ee Golaha Shacabka Mudane Cabdullaahi Cumar Abshirow iyo Guddoomiye kuxigeenka labaad ee Golaha Aqalka sare Mudane Cabdullaahi Xirsi Timacadde.

Ajendaha kulanka labada Aqal ee maanta ayaa waxa uu ahaa sii wadida ka doodista cutubka lixaad ee dastuurka Kmg ah gaar ahaan Qodobadiisa 80-aad ilaa 95-aad.

Guddoomiye kuxigeenka koowaad ee Golaha Aqalka sare Mudane Cali Shacbaan Ibraahim oo kulanka soo xiray ayaa sheegay in dooda cutubka lixaad ee dastuurka ay sii socon doonto, islamarkaana lasii amba qaadi kulanka kan xiga.

Taliyaha Ciidamada Booliiska Gaarka ah ee Dowladda Koonfur Galbeed, Isxaaq Cali Isxaaq Meeday, ayaa maanta xafiiskiisa ku qaabilay mas’uuliyiin iyo saraakiil sare oo ka tirsan hay’adaha amniga iyo maamulka.
Kulankan oo ahaa mid heerkiisu sarreeyo ayaa lagu falanqeeyey xaaladda guud ee amniga, xoojinta wada shaqeynta hay’adaha kala duwan, iyo dardargelinta qorshayaasha lagu xaqiijinayo nabadgelyo waarta. 
Mas’uuliyiinta iyo saraakiisha kulanka ka qeyb galay waxaa ka mid ahaa Gaashaanle Sare Axmed Cabdi Cali (Axmed Gaahaan), Taliyaha Guutada 7-aad, Qeybta 12-ka April ee Ciidanka Dhulka XDS, Gaashaanle Cabdi Mahad Xasan, U-qaabilsanaha Gobollada Dalka ee Taliska Ciidanka Asluubta Soomaaliyeed, Gaashaanle Dhexe Liibaan Yuusuf Garre , Taliyaha Guutada 6-aad, Qeybta 60-aad ee Ciidanka Dhulka XDS, Gaashaanle Dhexe Cabdulle Isxaaq, Taliyaha Saldhigga Degmada Wanlaweyn, iyo Mudane Cabdirisaaq Maxamed Axmed (Minishiibiyo), Guddoomiye Ku-xigeenka Amniga iyo Siyaasadda.
Intii uu kulanku socday, waxaa la is dhaafsaday aragtiyo iyo warbixino la xiriira xaaladda amni, iyadoo la isku raacay in la sii xoojiyo wada shaqeynta joogtada ah ee u dhexeysa ciidamada iyo mas’uuliyiinta, si loo gaaro amni sugan iyo kalsooni bulsho.

Muddo kala dhantaal iyo kala fogaansho jiray kadib, Alle fadligiis waxaa maanta dib loo soo celiyey midnimadii iyo wadajirkoodii beesha.

Waxaan si gaar ah u bogaadinayaa Nabadoonka Beelaha Dige Samatalis , Nabadoon Cabdirashiid Cabdicasiis Cilmi, oo dadaal iyo waqti badan geliyey sidii 10-ka Oday ay hal meel ugu wada fariisan lahaayeen, una qaadan lahaayeen go’aan mideysan. Tani ma ahayn hawl fudud, balse waxay ahayd mid u baahnayd hoggaan, xikmad iyo go’aan adag. Dadaalkaas wuxuu noqday iftiin dib u shiday rajadii iyo kalsoonidii beesha.

Sidoo kale, waxaan mahadnaq u diraynaa Beesha Iidle Yabar, gaar ahaan odayaasha iyo waxgaradka gogosha fidiyey. Gogosha aad dhigteen maanta ma ahan mid caadi ah; waa gogol mideysay quluub, waa gogol dib u soo celisay kalsooni, waa gogol dhidibka u aasaysa mustaqbal wadajir ku dhisan.

Midnimada iyo Muhiimaddeeda

Midnimadu waa saldhigga jiritaanka iyo horumarka beel kasta. Beel aan mideysneyn ma laha cod mideysan, ma laha awood difaac, mana laha jihada horumar ee ay ku gaari karto himilooyinkeeda. Laakiin marka la midoobo, taladu way toosantaa, go’aankuna wuu miisaam yeeshaa, sharafkuna wuu kordhaa.

Midnimadu ma aha eray la yiraahdo oo keliya, waa dhaqan iyo ficil maalinle ah. Waa in la is maqlo, la is ixtiraamo, lana kala hormariyo danta guud midda gaar ahaaneed. Waa in aan ka gudubnaa wixii na kala fogeeyay, kana shaqeynaa wixii na mideynaya.

Haddii 10-ka Oday maanta hal mowqif qaateen, waa fariin u dirtay dhammaan xubnaha beesha — dhalinyaro, haween iyo waxgarad — in la joogo xilligii wadajirka, wada tashiga iyo wada shaqeynta.

Doorka Dhalinyarada

Haddii aan nahay Midowga Dhalinyarada Yabar Madaxweyne, si buuxda ayaan u soo dhoweynaynaa una hambalyeynaynaa midnimadan taariikhiga ah. Waxaan ballanqaadeynaa in aan ilaalinno, xoojino, una beddelno midnimadaas ficil iyo horumar muuqda.

Dhalinyaradu waa laf-dhabarta mustaqbalka. Haddii aan mideysnaano, wax badan ayaan qabsan karnaa:
 • Horumarinta waxbarashada
 • Abuurista shaqooyin
 • Ka qeyb qaadashada nabadda iyo amniga
 • Dhismaha sumcad sharaf leh oo beesha ku faanto

Sidoo kale, degmooyinka uu mashruucu ka shaqeeyo oo dhammaantood ku daray qoondo lacageed oo dhan 3% kharashaadka mashruuca, taas oo muujinaysa lahaansho iyo ka-go’naansho.

On this day, 16 February 2007 — exactly 19 years ago — Uganda announced it would soon deploy 1,500 well-seasoned troops under the command of Levi Karuhanga. The soldiers had undergone two years of rigorous preparation ahead of what would become a defining regional security mission.

The deployment formed part of Uganda’s contribution to the African Union Mission in Somalia (AMISOM), a multinational effort aimed at stabilizing Somalia after years of conflict and insurgency. At the time, regional insecurity posed growing concerns for East Africa, with militant activity threatening cross-border stability and economic progress.

Uganda’s announcement signaled more than troop movement. It demonstrated Kampala’s willingness to take a frontline role in regional peace enforcement, projecting both military readiness and diplomatic commitment. The forces were among the first to deploy under AMISOM, setting a precedent for sustained engagement that would shape Uganda’s foreign and security policy for years to come.

Nineteen years later, the 2007 decision remains a significant milestone in Uganda’s modern military history — marking the country’s transition into a key security actor within East Africa and the broader African Union framework.

Mandera East mar kale waxay gashay mugdi baahsan, dhibaato soo noqnoqota sanad kasta xilli la soo dhowaado bisha barakeysan ee Ramadaan. Arrintan waxay noqotay ceeb joogto ah oo aan xal loo raadin si dhab ah. Dowladda dhexe iyo maamulka county-ga midkoodna ma muujin dadaal muuqda oo lagu joojinayo fashilka soo jiitamayay sannadaha badan.

Shacabka oo horeyba ula daalaa dhacayay abaar, saboolnimo iyo kuleyl daran ayaa haddana lagu sii cadaadinayaa koronto la’aan joogto ah. Halkii laga filayay xildhibaanka laga soo doorto Mandera East inuu hormuud ka noqdo xal raadinta, wuxuu u muuqdaa mid ku mashquulsan dano siyaasadeed iyo isu soo bandhigid, halkii uu waxqabad dhab ah keeni lahaa.

Wuxuu horey u ballan qaaday matoor 3.5 MHZ ah, balse ballanqaadkaas wuxuu noqday mid hadal ku ekaaday. Ma jiro matoor la arkay, ma jirto koronto xasilloon, mana jirto isla-xisaabtan. Waxa jira oo keliya kulamo xul ah iyo sawirro siyaasadeed oo lagu marin habaabinayo shacabka.

Mandera East uma baahna hadal qurux badan iyo bandhigyo siyaasadeed; waxay u baahan tahay hoggaan daacad ah oo wax qabta. Hoggaamiye waxaa lagu cabbiraa waxqabadkiisa, ma aha ballanqaadyo madhan iyo olole joogto ah. Shacabka dhibaataysan looma adeegsan karo jaranjaro siyaasadeed.

Mandera East has been experiencing widespread power outages that recur every year around this time, especially as the holy month of Ramadan approaches. Unfortunately, there appears to be no serious effort from either the national government or the county administration to address this ongoing problem.

The Member of Parliament elected from the area remains silent while poor residents struggle with the combined hardships of drought and lack of electricity. Instead of standing firmly for the community’s needs, he seems preoccupied with political manoeuvring in the town at a time when people are facing severe difficulties.

He previously claimed that he would supply a 3.5 M H Z generator, but there is no visible evidence that this promise was fulfilled. Rather than delivering practical solutions, he meets with select interest groups while presenting himself as sharing in the public’s suffering from the intense heat.

#UPDATE :- Gudoomiye Abshiroow iyo Wasiir Hussein Ali Haji oo dhexmaraya NISA iyo Taliska Turkida ee Muqdisho (TurkeySom) oo qorsheenaya in ay fuliyaan weerar la doonayo in lagu soo xiro Gudoomiye Cumareey Cali.

Gudoomiye kuxigeenka 2-aad ee BJFS Abdullahi Omar Abshirow iyo Wasiir kuxigeenka Cimilada iyo Deegaan Hussein Ali Haji oo Sabtidii la kulmay Agaasimaha hay’adda NISA, mahad Salaad iyo Taliska sare ee TurkeySom ayaa la wadaagay in Gudoomiyaha Hoggaanka Beelaha Biimaal Cumareey Cali uu aad u hub aruursaday, islamarkaana uu halis ku yahay qorshaha ay Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose ka leeyihiin Turkeyga, gaar ahaan Jilb-Marka.

Abshiroow iyo Hussein Ali Haji ayaa sheegay in uu Gudoomiye Cumareey uu hub iyo dhaqaalo ka helay Dowladda Imaaraadka oo uu ujeedkiisu yahay in uu dagaal la galo DFS, balse taasi waa been abuur.

Gudoomiye Cumareey ujeedkiisu waa in Beelaha Biimaal la mideeyo, si loo helo xuquuqaha ka maqan, iyo in ay maamul gaar ah dhistaan Beelaha Biimaal.

Dhanka kale Abshiroow iyo Xuseen Cali Xaaji waxay hadda qalqaalinayaan in hay’adda NISA iyo Taliska TurkeySom oo is garabsanaya ay weerar ku qaadaan Gudoomiye Cumareey lana soo xiro, iyaga oo baqdin xoogan ka qaba in haddii uu Cumareey mideeyo Beelaha Biimaal ay iyagu daaqadda ka baxayaan, sidaasi darteed ay go’aansadeen in ay u riixaan fuusto ah in uu Cumaareey yahay hogaamiye kooxeed Dowladda kasoo horjeeda.

Warar hoose waxa ay sheegayaan in hay’adda NISA oo kaashanaysa taliyada ciidanka maamulka KGS, taliska 14-ka October, ciidanka Amisom iyo awoodo kale oo ay Turkidu kor ka maamusho ay qorsheenayaan in ay dhawaan weerar xoogan ku qaadaan ciidanka deegaanka ee uu hogaamiyo gudoomiye Cumareey Cali.

Bulshada Beelaha Biimaal ee Marka ku sugan ayaa hadda qorsheenaya in ay banaanbax xoogan oo looga soo horjeedo in la weeraro Cumareey ay ku dhigaan Magaalada Marka si looga hortago qorshaha Abshiroow.

Abshiroow iyo Xuseen Cali Xaaji oo inta badan arimaha Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose gacanta ku haya ayaa geeri siyaasadeed u arka haddii uu Cumareey xoogaysto oo ay Beesha Biimaal midowdo, iyaga oo hadda ku howlan in ay kala furfuraan intii uu Cumareey isku keenay, waxayna wararku sheegayaan in Maxamed Sheekh oo maalmihii dambe xulufo la ahaa Cumareey lagu amray in uu ciidankiisa kasoo wato Cumareey Cali, kana fogaado in uu garab siiyo ama uu awood ciidan ku taageero.

Falanqeyn Siyaasadeed: Xaaladda Hoggaaminta UAE iyo Saameynta Khaliijka.

Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan (MBZ) waa Madaxweynaha Imaaraadka Carabta (UAE) isla markaana ah hoggaamiyaha ugu awoodda badan dalkaas tan iyo markii uu si rasmi ah xilka ula wareegay sanadkii 2022, kaddib geeridii walaalkiis, Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan. Intii ka horreysay shaacinta geerida Khalifa, muddo dheer ayuu xanuunsanaa mana uusan si muuqata uga soo dhex muuqan saaxadda dadweynaha, taasoo dhalisay hadal-hayn siyaasadeed iyo falanqeyn kala duwan.

Dhanka kale, Tahnoun bin Zayed Al Nahyan ayaa isaguna ka mid ah shaqsiyaadka ugu saamaynta badan gudaha UAE, gaar ahaan dhinacyada amniga qaranka, sirdoonka, iyo maalgashiga istaraatiijiga ah. Waxaa la ogyahay inuu xiriir dhow la leeyahay Sacuudi Carabiya, gaar ahaan dhinacyada amni iyo dhaqaale, hase yeeshee ma jirto wax caddeyn rasmi ah oo muujinaysa khilaaf qoys ama isku day afgembi oo heer sare gaaray.

SU’AASHA TAAGAN:

Ma suurtagal baa in Sacuudi Carabiya “wato” qof beddela Mohamed bin Zayed?

Marka si xeel dheer loo eego siyaasadda Khaliijka:

UAE iyo Sacuudi Carabiya waa xulafo istaraatiiji ah, inkastoo mararka qaar ay ku kala aragti duwanaan karaan arrimo ay ka mid yihiin Yemen, istiraatiijiyadda dhaqaale, iyo hoggaaminta gobolka.

Go’aanka cidda noqoneysa Madaxweynaha UAE wuxuu si gaar ah ugu jiraa gacanta qoyska Al Nahyan iyo Golaha Sare ee Taliyayaasha (Supreme Council of Rulers), mana aha arrin si toos ah uga timaadda dal shisheeye.

Xiriirka UAE iyo Israa’iil, gaar ahaan kaddib heshiiskii Abraham Accords, waa mid ku dhisan danaha istaraatiijiga ah ee labada dhinac, balse ma jirto caddeyn muujinaysa faragelin toos ah oo ku saabsan hoggaanka gudaha UAE.

Qaab-dhismeedka Siyaasadda Khaliijka

Siyaasadda Khaliijka guud ahaan waxay ku dhisan tahay saddex tiir oo waaweyn:

1) Danta dhaqaale
2) asiloonida amni ee gobolka
3) Isku dheelitirka awoodda siyaasadeed

Haddii isbeddel hoggaamineed ka dhaco UAE, waxa mudnaanta koowaad la siin doono waa ilaalinta xasiloonida gudaha iyo sii jiritaanka nidaamka qoyska boqortooyada — ma aha rabitaanka ama faragelinta dowlad kale.
Arrimaha noocan ah inta badan waxay ku badan yihiin warar xan ah iyo saadaal siyaasadeed, gaar ahaan marka hoggaamiye muddo aan la arkin ama xaaladdiisa caafimaad laga hadlo.

Gunaanad ahaan, inkastoo gobolka Khaliijku uu mar walba ku jiro tartan istaraatiiji ah oo ku saabsan saamaynta iyo hoggaaminta, haddana ma jiraan calaamado muujinaya marxalad cusub oo isbeddel awood ah oo si rasmi ah u billowday. Qodobada la isla dhexmarayo badankood waxay u muuqdaan kuwo lagu buunbuuniyey baraha bulshada halkii ay ka ahaan lahaayeen xog rasmi ah oo la xaqiijiyey.

Ciidankaas maanta kaalin weyn buu ka qaataa difaaca Puntland bad iyo berriba. Waxa kale oo Imaraadku gacan weyn innaga siiyey dhismaha ciidamada Booliiska iyo kuwa daraawiishka oo uu ku bixiyey dhaqaalo badan tababarkooda. Hawlgalkii Hillaac ee guusha ku dhammaaday Imaraadku kaalin libaax ah buu ka qaatay oo duqeymo cirka ah iyo saanad militeri oo keliya innagu ma caawimin ee hawada sare waa kii ciidankeenna saadka ugu tuuraayey. Dhaawaca ciidankeenna diyaarado helicopters ah oo ambulance ah buu innagu taageeray. 

Kaabaha dhaqaalaha Puntland kaalin libaax leh buu ka qaatay Imaraadku. Marka laga yimaaddo dhismaha dekedda Boosaaso iyo dayactirkeeda, Imaraadku intaas oo markab oo shamiito (sibidh) ah buu ugu deeqay waddooyinka waaweyn ee isku xira dalkeenna Puntland. Taariikh ahaan iyo ganacsi ahaanba innagu waxa aynnu weligeen ku xirneyn Imaraadka. Yacnii Xasan Sheekh waxa uu ka hinaasay Maraykanka iyo Imaaraadka oo Puntland wadashaqeyn buuxda la yeeshay, isaga iyo maamulkiisana ka aammin baxay. Markaa yaan la innagu dirin Imaraadka oo riwaayad been ah la inoo dhisin. Munaasabadda shaacinta astaanta iyo ballan-qaadka Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee doorashada 7aad ee qaranka ayaa caawa lagu qabtay magaalada Jigjiga.

Madaxweynaha DDS, Mudane Mustafe Muxumed Cumar, Afhayeenka Golaha Xildhibaanada DDS Marwo Ayaan Cabdi, masuuliyiinta Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee heer deegaan iyo taageerayaal tiro badan ayaa ka qayb-galay munaasabadda oo si heer sare ah loo soo agaasimay, laguna soo bandhigay astaanta iyo ballan-qaadka xisbiga ee doorashada 7aad ee qaranka.

Madaxweyne Mustafe Muxumed Cumar ayaa sheegay in Xisbiga Barwaaqo wax badan ka qabtay horumarinta kaabayaasha aasaasiga ah ee deegaanka. Sidoo kale, mabaa’diida xisbigu ku dhisan yihiin midnimo qaran, isla markaana dalka lagu hoggaaminayo aragti ku salaysan horumar, wadajir iyo barwaaqo.

Eng. Maxamed Shaalle, Madaxa Xisbiga Barwaaqo ee Laanta DDS, oo ka hadlay madasha, ayaa sheegay in Xisbiga Barwaaqo uu shacabka u ballanqaadayo in haddii uu ku guuleysto doorashada, la fulin doono mashaariic horumarineed oo ka jawaabaya baahiyaha dhabta ah ee bulshada.

Wuxuu xusay in Xisbiga Barwaaqo uu hore uga dhabeeyey ballanqaadyadii uu la galay shacabka, isla markaana deegaan ahaan laga hirgeliyey mashaariic waaweyn oo muuqda, kuwaas oo wax ka beddelay adeegyada iyo horumarka bulshada.
Sidoo kale, Eng. Maxamed Shaalle ayaa ugu baaqay dhammaan axsaabta siyaasadda inay ka wada shaqeeyaan sidii doorashadu ugu qabsoomi lahayd si nabad ah, xasillooni iyo is-ixtiraam ku dheehan tahay, si loo xoojiyo dimuqraadiyadda iyo wadajirka bulshada.

Wasiir ku-xigeenka Wasaaradda Beeraha iyo Waraabka Hirshabeelle, Mudane Maxamed Bashiir Qaasim Daqare, ayaa xiray tababarkan oo loo qabtay beeraleyda degmada Jowhar, waxaana sidoo kale ka qeyb galay xubno ka socday Jaamacadda Zamzam faraceeda Jowhar.

Tababarkan ayaa lagu baranayey hababka kaydinta abuurka iyo ka hortagga cayayaanka waxyeelleeya beeraha, si loo kordhiyo wax-soo-saarka iyo tayada dalagga.

Qaar ka mid ah beeraleyda iyo ardayda Jaamacadda Zamzam ayaa ka hadlay faa’iidada ay u arkeen tababarka, iyagoo tilmaamay inuu kor u qaaday aqoontooda beeraha casriga ah.

Ugu dambeyn, Wasiir ku-xigeenka Wasaaradda, Mudane Maxamed Bashiir Qaasim Daqare, ayaa dardaaran iyo talooyin wax ku ool ah u jeediyay beeraleyda iyo ardayda ka qeyb gashay tababarka

post_author_name_pi: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada, Hiddaha & Tacliinta Sare ee Hirshabelle
post_text_pi:
Muqdisho, Soomaaliya feb/17/2026/:- Wasiirka Wasaaradda Waxbarashada iyo Tacliinta Sare ee Dowladda Hirshabelle, Mudane Saciid Hagar Camalow, ayaa ka qeybgalay shir oo looga hadlay horumarinta waxbarashada dalka iyo ka-faa’iidaysiga mashaariicda waxbarasho ee caalamiga ah, gaar ahaan mashruuca Global Partnership for Education (GPE), kaas oo sanadkii 2025 si mug leh looga faa’iideystay.

Shirka oo socday labadii maalmood ee u dambeeyay, ayaa diiradda lagu saaray sidii loo xoojin lahaa dadaallada waxbarashada dalka, lana dardargelin lahaa hirgelinta mashaariicda weli dhiman, isla markaana kor loogu qaadi lahaa tayada iyo helitaanka waxbarashada guud ahaan Soomaaliya.

Waxaa si gaar ah shirka looga hadlay:
 
• Xoojinta mashaariicda waxbarashada ee dalka, gaar ahaan kuwa ay taageerto GPE
 
• Dardargelinta mashaariicda weli dhiman si loo gaaro hadafyada waxbarasho ee dalka
 
• Isku-duwidda dadaallada waxbarashada ee dowladda federaalka iyo dowlad-goboleedyada
 
• Kobcinta fursadaha waxbarasho ee carruurta iyo dhalinyarada, gaar ahaan meelaha ay waxbarashada ka liidato

Shirka waxaa guddoominayay Wasiirka Wasaaradda Waxbarashada, Hiddaha iyo Tacliinta Sare ee Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudan Farah Sheekh Abdiqadir, waxaana ka qeybgalay Wasiirrada Waxbarashada ee heer dowlad-goboleed, khubaro waxbarasho, iyo wakiillo ka socday GPE.

Mudane Saciid Hagar Camalow ayaa intii uu shirka socday ku adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay in mashruuca GPE si buuxda looga faa’iideysto, isla markaana mashaariicda waxbarashada loo hago si loo gaaro horumar waara oo dalka dhan saameynaya. Wasiirku wuxuu sidoo kale tilmaamay in iskaashiga dowladda iyo hay’adaha caalamiga ah uu yahay furaha guusha waxbarashada Soomaaliya.

Shirka ayaa dhamaanayay iyadoo la isku raacay qorsheyaal iyo talaabooyin cad-cad oo lagu dardargelinayo hirgelinta mashaariicda waxbarashada, gaar ahaan kuwa ay taageerto GPE, si loo hubiyo in dhammaan carruurta Soomaaliyeed helaan waxbarasho tayo leh oo la jaanqaadaysa caalamka.

-Dhamaad-

Wasiir Ku-xigeenka Wasaaradda Beeraha iyo Waraabka Dowladda Hirshabeelle, Mudane Maxamed Bashiir Qaasim Daqare, ayaa kormeeray goobta shaqadu ka socoto, isagoo warbixin ka dhageystay shirkadda fulineysa mashruuca.

Magacaabis Rasmi Ah. 

Guddoomiyaha Midowga Midnimo Youth League ayaa si rasmi ah u magacaabay xubnaha Golaha Dhexe (Baarlamaanka) ee Midowga, kuwaas oo noqonaya hay’adda ugu sarreysa ee go’aan qaadashada, isla markaana matalaya dhammaan xubnaha Midowga.

Magacaabistan ayaa timid kadib la-tashi, qiimeyn iyo tixgelin lagu sameeyay kartida, daacadnimada iyo waayo-aragnimada xubnaha la magacaabay, si loo helo Baarlamaan awood u leh gudashada waajibaadka qaran ee saaran Midowga.

Xubnaha la magacaabay ee Golaha Dhexe (Baarlamaanka) waa:

1.Maxamed Cabdi Samaale
2.Mohamed Abdullahi Daahiye
3.Yusuf Ali Arab
4.Mohamoud Mahad
5.Ayaan Abdisamad
6.Abdirahman Ali
7.Abdiwali Ali Beceeye 

Guddoomiyuhu wuxuu ku ammaanay xubnahan kalsoonida iyo masuuliyadda loo igmaday, isagoo ku boorriyay inay si daacadnimo, hufnaan iyo midnimo leh u gutaan waajibaadkooda, kana shaqeeyaan horumarinta Midowga iyo ilaalinta dastuurkiisa.

Golaha Dhexe wuxuu door muuqda ka qaadan doonaa ansixinta xeerarka, kormeerka Golaha Fulinta, iyo doorashada hoggaanka sare ee Midowga, si loo xaqiijiyo nidaam ku dhisan isla xisaabtan iyo wada-tashi.

Ugu dambayn, Guddoomiyaha Midnimo Youth League wuxuu u rajeeyay xubnaha cusub guul iyo in ay noqdaan tiir adag oo xoojiya midnimada, himilada iyo horumarka Midowga.

Marka la eego Dastuurka Ku-meelgaarka ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, qodobka 84aad wuxuu dhigaya in xildhibaan uu noqon karo wasiir isagoo aan ka tagin kursigiisa Baarlamaanka. Qaabkan wuxuu muujinayaa in xukuumaddu ka dhalato Baarlamaanka, balse wuxuu dhalinayaa su’aal ku saabsan isla xisaabtanka, maadaama xildhibaan ka tirsan xukuumadda aanu si madax-bannaan u kormeeri karin shaqada xukuumadda uu isagu qayb ka yahay.

Haddii qodobkaas dib u habeyn lagu sameeyo si loo caddeeyo in xildhibaan aan isku mar u qaban karin xil fulineed, ama uu si toos ah kursiga u waayo marka la magacaabo, waxaa la adkeyn karaa kala xadeynta awoodaha dowladeed. Tani waxay siin kartaa hay’adda sharci dejinta awood buuxda oo dabagal iyo qiimeyn ah, halka fulintu ay heli karto xirfadlayaal iyo khubaro ka baxsan golayaasha sharci dejinta (Baarlamaanka). Habkaan cusub wuxuu sare u qaadi karaa kalsoonida muwaadiniinta iyo tayada hoggaaminta wasaaradaha.

Fikirkeyga, ka guurista nidaamka 4.5 loona guuro nidaam xisbiyo ku dhisan waxay is waafajin kartaa dib u habeyntaas. Qaabka 4.5 wuxuu ku tiirsan yahay awood qaybsiga beelaha, halka nidaamka xisbiyadu ku saleysan yahay aragti, qorshe iyo tartan ku dhisan waxqabad. Marka la helo axsaab leh siyaasad cad oo qaran, waxaa fududaan karta in tartanku noqdo mid ku qotoma himilooyin siyaasadeed halkii uu ku xirnaan lahaa matalaad qabiil.

Aragtideyda,dib u eegista qodobka 84aad iyo u gudbidda nidaam xisbiyo waxay wada abuuri karaan qaab dowladeed oo ku dhisan daahfurnaan, tartan furan iyo hoggaan leh karti. Isbeddelladan haddii si xeel dheer loo hirgeliyo, waxay xoojin karaan tayada maamul iyo kalsoonida dadweynaha.

 • Ma doonayno kulankan hadda

Farriin loo dirayo Mareykanka.

Marka MBZ qaabilo Senator Mareykan ah xilli Erdogan la diiday, UAE waxay leedahay Annagu nahay xulafada aad ku tiirsanaan kartaan, Lindsey Graham ma aha senator caadi ah, waa wakiil ka tirsan xuddunta go’aanka amniga Mareykanka.

UAE waxay muujinaysaa inay rabto in arrimaha gobolka lagu wajaho, iyadoo Mareykanka garab taagan yahay, halkii ay Turkiga kula tartami lahayd si furan.

Wasiirku waxa kale oo uu ka warbixiyey Safar Shaqo oo isaga, Wasiirka Gaashaan-Dhigga, Wasiirka Khayraadka Biyaha, Saraakiil iyo xubno kake ay ku tageen Gobollada Salel iyo Awdal si ay ugu kuur galaan xaaladaha amni ee degaannadaasi iyo sidii la isugu soo dhawayn lahaa bulshada walaalaha ah ee ku wada nool deganadaasi, isaga oo sheegay in dedaalladaasi ay meel wacan marayaan.

Ujeedka Deni iyo Madoobe wuxuu ahaa in faro galinta shisheeyaha la sahlo oo

Madaxweyne H.E Said Abdullahi Deni waxaa  Villa Somalia kusoo dhoweeyay Madaxweyne Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, waxaa halkan ka furmaya Shirka Golaha Mustaqbalka Soomaaliya iyo Dowladda Federaalka ah ee Soomaaliya.

Madaxweynayaasha Dowlad Goboleedyada Jubaland iyo Puntland ayaa soo gaaray Villa Somalia , halkaas oo ay kaga qayb geli doonaan furitaanka Shirka Madasha Mustaqbalka iyo Dowladda Dhexe.

Shirka oo la filayo in uu saacadaha soo socda furmo ayaa lagu wadaa in maanta lagu falanqeeyo arrimaha uusan muranka weyn ka jirin, sida Abaaraha, Dagaalka kooxaha nabad-diidka ah, iyo Tabashooyinka gaarka ah ee ay qabaan maamulada Jubaland iyo Puntland.

Qodobada muuhiimka ee sida wayn loogu kala aragtida duwan yahay ee ay kamidka yihiin Dastuurk Kumeel gaarka ah, Qabsoomida Doorashooyinka iyo Awood qaybsiga dalka oo uu Madaxwayne Xasan waxbadan ka badalay ayaa lagu wadaa in ay maalinta bari ah loo dib dhigo.

Siyaasiyiinta madasha ayaa qaba cabsi weyn oo ah in dhanka Dowladda Dhexe ay ka fulin waayaan wixii lagu heshiiyo, taas ayaana noqonaysa dooda ugu badan ee shirka maanta.

Dowladda Jubaland ayaa lagu wadaa in ay maanta ka hadasho qodobada xayiraadda garoonka Dollow, siyaasadaynta gargaarka bani’aadanimo, fasixidda mashaariicda xayiran iyo arrinta gobolka Gedo.

Shirka waxaa qayb ka ah Ra’iisul Wasaare Hamza Abdi Barre  oo u muuqda mid ay ka go’an tahay in shirka miro dhasho.

Waxaa si horudhac ah la iskula meel dhigay aqbalidda 5 sano ee Madaxweyne Axmed, oo aan iyadu gorgortan ku jirin.

Mahadaay – Gobolka Shabeellaha Dhexe.

Degmada Mahadaay ayaa maanta martigelisay kulan muhiim ah oo la-tashi iyo wacyigelin bulsho ah, kaas oo si rasmi ah uga furmay magaalada Mahadaay.

Kulankan waxaa si wadajir ah u daah-furay Wasiir Kuxigeenka Wasaaradda Dib-u-Heshiisiinta iyo Nabadeynta Dowladda Hirshabelle, Mudane Ahmed Mohamed Abdullahi, oo ay garab taagnaayeen Agaasimaha Guud ee Wasaaradda, Mudane Abdishakur Abdullahi Mohamed, iyo Guddoomiyaha Degmada Mahadaay, Mudane Ahmed Hussein Afrah.

Kulankan oo ah mid hordhac u ah qorsheyaasha dhexdhexaadinta iyo xalinta khilaafaadka bulshada, ayaa diiradda lagu saaray xoojinta wadajirka, dhisidda kalsoonida iyo horumarinta wada noolaanshaha bulshada degmada. Intii uu socday kulanku, waxaa si qoto dheer looga dooday doorka odayaasha dhaqanka, culimada, haweenka iyo dhalinyarada ay ku leeyihiin nabadeynta iyo xalinta khilaafaadka jira.

Mas’uuliyiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshada inay adkeeyaan midnimada, is-ixtiraamka iyo wada hadalka furan, si loo gaaro nabad waarta oo sal adag ku taagan. Waxa sidoo kale la caddeeyay in Wasaaradda Dib-u-Heshiisiinta iyo Nabadeynta Dowladda Hirshabelle ay ka go’an tahay taageeridda dadaallada nabadeed ee ka socda degmada.

Kulankan ayaa qeyb ka ah istaraatiijiyadda lagu xoojinayo nabadda, dib-u-heshiisiinta iyo wada noolaanshaha bulshada deegaanada Hirshabelle, gaar ahaan Degmada Mahadaay.

"Shirka Dowladda Federaalka iyo Mucaaradka oo Isku Qilaaf ku Soo Dhammaaday.

"Shirkii u dhexeeyay Madaxda Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya iyo Siyaasiyiinta Mucaaradka, oo markii ugu horreysay ka dhacay Madaxtooyada Villa Somalia, ayaa maanta soo dhammaaday iyadoo aan wax heshiis ah laga gaarin qodobadii ugu waaweynaa ee laga dooday.

"Qodobka ugu horreeya ee shirka diiradda lagu saaray wuxuu ahaa xaaladda doorashooyinka ee saddexda Dowlad-goboleed ee kala ah Hirshabelle, Galmudug, iyo Koonfur Galbeed, maadaama muddo-xileedkooda uu dhammaaday.

"Labada dhinac—Mucaaradka iyo Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya—ayaa markii hore isla qaatay in doorashooyinka Maamul-goboleedyadaas lagu qabto muddo laba bilood ah.

"Ugu dambayn, shirka ayaa ku soo dhammaaday is-ku-qilaaf, waxaana lagu kala tagay iyadoo dib loo ballamay si wadahadalladu u sii socdaan.

Maxaa ka dhigan kulankan?
🤝 Isu soo dhawaansho siyaasadeed – Marka mucaarad iyo muxaafid wada fariistaan, waxay tilmaamaysaa in danta qaranka laga hormariyey khilaafka.

Sawirku wuxuu muujinayaa masuuliyiin si taxaddar leh u dhegaysanaya, taasoo astaan u ah in dooddu tahay mid miisaan leh. Siyaasaddu mar walba waa tartan, balse marka la joogo dan qaran, wada hadal ayaa ka qiimo badan kala fogaansho.

Madaxda Dowlad-goboleedyada Hirshabelle, Galmudug iyo Koonfur Galbeed waxaa liidanaan siyaasadeed ku ah in masiirkooda iyo go’aannada khuseeya lagu gorgortamo iyaga oo aan goob joog ka ahayn. Arrintani waxay dhaawacaysaa mabda’a federaalka, wada-tashiga iyo kalsoonida shacabka ay metelaan.

Shirka Golaha Mustaqbalka iyo Madaxda Dowladda Federaalka ee maanta Muqdisho ka furmay waa fursad lagu saxo tabashooyinkan. Madaxweynaha dowlad-goboleed kasta waa inuu ku doodo in go’aannada qaran lagu gaaro wada-tashi buuxa, si loo ilaaliyo sharciyadda, karaamada maamulada iyo midnimada Soomaaliya.

Madasha Mucaaradka ayaa isku raacay in guddi ka kooban Siciid Cabdullaahi Deni, Shariif Sheekh Axmed, Cabdiraxmaan Cabdishakuur Warsame iyo Cabdullaahi Carab ay la fariistaan Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, si looga wada hadlo arrimaha doorashooyinka.

Tallaabadan ayaa timid kaddib markii maanta Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh uu soo bandhigay saddex qodob oo uu ku sheegay in loo baahan yahay in laga wada shaqeeyo, kuwaas oo ku saabsan hirgelinta doorasho qof iyo cod ah.

Qodobada uu soo jeediyay Madaxweynaha:
 • Deegaanka: In doorashooyinka golayaasha deegaanka la qabto ka hor 15-ka April 2026.
 • Dowlad Goboleedyada: In markaasi kadib si baarlamaani ah loo doorto madaxweynayaasha dowlad goboleedyada.
 • Marka Intaas la Qabto in lagu heshiiyo hannaanka doorashada heer qaran.

Madasha Mucaaradka ayaan weli siin madaxweynaha jawaab rasmi ah, balse waxay yeesheen kulan ay kaga arrinsanayaan mowqifka ay ka qaadanayaan soo jeedintaas.

Dhanka kale, waxaa muuqata kala aragti duwanaansho ka dhex jirta Golaha Mustaqbalka. Madaxda Puntland iyo Jubaland waxay doonayaan in la qaato hannaan la mid ah doorashadii 2022, halka xubno ka tirsan mucaaradka ay u arkaan in nidaamkaasi awood dheeraad ah siinayo dowlad goboleedyada, isla markaana ay lagama maarmaan tahay in la keeno qorshe doorasho oo ka duwan kii hore.

According to a report by Africa Intelligence, a covert Sudanese led training mission is operating in Somalia’s Galmudug state.

Mostly retired Sudanese Armed Forces officers, led by Brig. Gen. Omar Al Siddiq Ibrahim Mohamed, trained about 1,000 Somali militia recruits under a confidential deal with NISA.

The effort is framed as advisory support to bolster federal aligned forces amid tensions with Puntland and Jubaland. The operation has remained low profile, and its wider impact on Horn of Africa stability remains uncertain as Sudan fights its own war.

Sawirkan wuxuu ka tarjumayaa rajo iyo bilow cusub oo ku wajahan mustaqbalka siyaasadeed ee Soomaaliya. 
Waa muuqaal muujinaya in madaxda dalka iyo mucaaradkuba ay miis wada fadhiyaan, taasoo astaan u ah wada-hadal, isu-tanaasul iyo in laga gudbo khilaafaadkii hore.
Maanta dunidu waxay ku socotaa nidaam ku dhisan wada-tashi, dimuqraadiyad iyo horumar dhaqaale. 
Wadamada horumaray sida United States waxay ku gaareen xasilooni iyo barwaaqo iyagoo mudnaanta siiyay midnimo qaran, sharci adag, iyo in danaha guud laga hormariyo danaha gaarka ah. 
Shacabkooda waxay ku nool yihiin nolol ku dhisan adeegyo bulsho, shaqo-abuur, iyo amni waara – taasoo ah himilo ay mudan yihiin shacabka Soomaaliyeed.
Geeska Afrika waa gobol istiraatiiji ah oo dunidu indhaha ku hayso, gaar ahaan marka la eego marin-biyoodka, ganacsiga iyo amniga. 
Dalalka gobolka qaarkood waxay muujiyeen in xasiloonidu tahay furaha horumarka. 
Soomaaliya haddii ay hesho hoggaan mideysan oo ka shaqeeya danta qaranka, waxay si buuxda uga faa’iidaysan kartaa khayraadkeeda dabiiciga ah, juquraafi ahaan meel muhiim ah, iyo dadkeeda firfircoon.
Soomaaliya waxay muddo dheer la daalaa dhacaysay caqabado siyaasadeed, amni iyo dhaqaale. 
Si looga gudbo dhibaatadaas, waxaa lama huraan ah in madaxda aqoonyahanka, mucaaradka, muxaafidka iyo xukuumaduba ay ka wada shaqeeyaan hal ajande oo qaran horumarinta dalka iyo badbaadinta mustaqbalka jiilka soo koraya. Isu-tanaasulku ma aha tabar-darro, waa geesinimo siyaasadeed. Wada-hadalku ma aha is-dhiibid, waa waddada keliya ee lagu gaaro heshiis waara.
Madashan sawirku muujinayo waa mid dhiirrigelin leh. 
Waxay astaan u tahay in gacmaha la is-qabsado, qalbiyada la isu furo, lagana gudbo kala shaki iyo is-marin-waa. 
Haddii danaha gaarka ah laga hormariyo danaha guud, waxaa suurta gal noqon karta in Soomaaliya ay noqoto dal ka dhex muuqda Geeska Afrika, kanaalin kara fursadaha maalgashi, ganacsi iyo iskaashi caalami ah.

Shirkii Villa Somalia Iyo Golaha Mustaqbalka Ee Barri oo baaqday Iyo Taliye Mahad Salaad oo Door Siyaasadeed oo wayn ciyaaraya.👇

Shirkii berri 2:00PM loo balansanaa oo baaqday.

Sida aan ka ogaanay ilo xog-ogaal ah waxaa baaqday shirkii loo balansanaa in berri duhurkii la isugu tago Villa Somalia.

Taliyaha hay’adda Nabad sugidda iyo Sirdoonka Qaranka Mahad Maxamed Salaad oo wata qorshahan ayaa madaxda sar sare ku qanciyay in bannaanka lagu soo heshiiyo oo war-murtiyeedka (Communiqué) oo diyaarsan la isugu soo laabta Madaxtooyada Villa Somalia.

Mahad Salaad ayaa berri booqan doona Hotel Airport oo ay degganyihiin masuuliyiinta ugu muhiimsan Golaha Mustaqbalka, wuxuuna xoogga saari doonaa inuu kala xaajooda rabitaanka Madaxweyne Xasan ee doorashada.

Qaar ka mid ah xubnaha farsamada shirka kala shaqaynaya Villa Somalia ayaa ka soo horjeeda aragtida Mahad Salaad, waxayna qabaan in shirka sidiisii loo wado, Laakiin waxaa muuqata inuu Mahad ku xoogganyahay howshan uuna ku qanciyay Madaxtooyada, isagoo dhinaca Madasha Mustaqbalka xiriiro uu la sameeyay qaarkood ku qanciyay qorshihiisa ah in bannaanka lagu soo heshiiyo, Lana baajiyo kulamada aan natiijada badan lahayn.

Villa Somalia ayaa durba miiska soo saartay 135 oday oo ah qaabkii loo galay doorashadii 2012, haddii la diido qorshaha ay wataan ee doorashada qof iyo cod.

Halkan kala soco wixii xog ah ee shirka la xiriirta.

Kaddib hanjabaadaha iyo diyaargarowga dagaal ee Mareykanka, Iran ayaa shalay Golaha Ammaanka gaysay warqad rasmi ah oo digniin wadata. Warqadda ayaa lagu yiri, “Diyaargarowga milatari ee Mareykanka waa in aan loo qaadan hadal oo kaliya; waa arrin muujinaysa khatar dhab ah iyo duullaan ciidan.”

Warqadda ayaa lagu yiri, “Iran ma bilaabi doonto wax dagaal ah, bal se haddii la soo weeraro, waxay bixin doontaa jawaab adag oo dheelitiran, iyadoo ku dhaqmeysa Qodobka 51‑aad ee is‑difaaca."

Iran waxaa kale oo ay sheegtay in ay weerari doonto oo “bartilmaameed ka dhiganeyso dhammaan saldhigyada, xarumaha, iyo hantida ciidan ee cidda weerarka waddaa ay gobolka ku leedahay.”

Warqadda ayaa lagu soo gabagabeeyey, “Mareykanka ayaa yeelan doonaa mas’uuliyadda iyo cawaaqib-xumo kasta oo aan la saadaalin karin ama aan la xakameyn karin oo ka dhalata weerarka.”

Federal Government of Somalia’s Weekly Briefing
Mogadishu, Friday, 20th February, 2026

1- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud chaired a meeting between the Federal Government of Somalia and the Future Council, held at Villa Somalia, in which existential issues were discussed, including elections, completion of the constitution, droughts, and the fight against the Kharijites (extremists).

2- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud hosted a luncheon for the members of the Future Council who are in Mogadishu following a government invitation.

3- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud congratulated the Somali people and the entire Muslim Ummah on the holy month of Ramadan, calling for solidarity with Somalis affected by the country’s drought.

4- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud held a productive telephone discussion with the Amir of Qatar, Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al-Thani, focusing on strengthening and advancing the strategic relationship between the two countries.

5- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud participated in a high-level meeting on the future of the United Nations, held in Addis Ababa, as part of key summit activities of the African Union Heads of State Summit.

6- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre, who congratulated the Somali people on the advent of the holy month of Ramadan, urged unity and solidarity, and encouraged mercy for those affected by drought.

7- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre met with the Qatar Ambassador to Somalia, Dr. Abdullahi Bin Salim Al-Nucaymi, and they discussed intensifying cooperative ties between Somalia and Qatar.

8- Deputy Prime Minister Salah Ahmed Jama delivered an important address at the Africa Trade Conference, emphasizing investment opportunities for Somalia in the areas of ports, agriculture, and fishing.

9- Interior Security Minister Abdullahi Sheikh Ismail officially has received weapons and equipment belonging to a unit of the Special Police to the Harmacad group.

10- Minister of Information, Culture and Tourism H.E. Daud Aweis Jama inaugurated the Ramadan quiz competition, congratulating the national media for the 16th year of the program’s public discussion competition.

11- Minister of Energy and Water Resources Abdullahi Bidhan Warsame welcomed the new Director of the WFP Office for Somalia, Hameed Nuru, focusing on strengthening water governance and the use of modern water data systems.

12- The Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs held a Coordination Conference on Social Protection in Mogadishu to bolster cooperation among the Federal Government, Federal Member States, and partners to accelerate social protection programs.

13- Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation Abdisalam Abdi Ali hosted Mousa Jama Ali, the Special Envoy of IGAD for South Sudan, and they discussed strengthening peace and security cooperation in the region.

14- Ministers of Defense, Interior, and the Army Chief of Staff visited the Sabiid and Caanoole areas in Lower Shabelle to formally rebuild the families displaced earlier by the Kharijites group.

15- Minister of Trade and Industry Jamal Mohamed Hassan met in Addis Ababa with Claver Gatete, the United Nations Secretary-General’s Special Envoy for Africa, to discuss trade and investment opportunities in Somalia.

16- Minister of Defense Ahmed Moalim Fiqi held a meeting with the Chinese Ambassador to Somalia, Wang Yu, to discuss boosting bilateral cooperation.

17- Minister of Interior, Federal Affairs and Reconciliation Ali Yusuf Ali officially opened the Joint High Committee for the Dowlad-Kaab project, emphasizing the importance of the project for governance.

18- Minister of Petroleum Dahir Shire Mohamed described as historic milestone, noting the departure of the ship Cagri Bey from Turkey, which will carry out oil exploration off Somali coasts.

19- Minister of Finance Bihi Iman Ige presided over the 24th meeting of Finance Ministers of the Federal Member States and the Banadir region, focusing on strengthening cooperation and coordination of the country’s financial management framework.

20- Minister of Information, Culture and Tourism H.E. Daud Aweis Jama led a delegation from the Northwest State of Somalia, led by the Information Minister Ahmed Diriye, on a visit.

21- Minister of Defense and the Army Chief of Staff sent congratulations to the Somali Air Force on the 66th anniversary of its founding, praising its role in national defense and counter-terrorism.

22- Turkey said farewell to the Cağri Bey ship, which is approaching Somalia to conduct oil exploration off the country’s shores.

23- The African Union communiqué firmly condemned the illegal recognition allegedly granted by Israel to Somaliland’s region in northern Somalia, reiterating their stance on protecting Somalia’s sovereignty, unity, and territorial integrity.

24- Somali Ambassador to Tanzania Ilyas Ali Hassan, formally handed over to the Somali governments’ officials documents allowing Somalia to print and issue the East African Community (EAC) passport.

25- The Director General of the Ministry of Transportation and Aviation, Omar Ali Afrah, chaired a meeting on the plan for constructing roads and the drainage system at Aden Adde International Airport in Mogadishu.

26- Dr. Maryam Qasim, Chairperson of the Independent National Human Rights Committee, met with Kirsten Young, the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights for Somalia.

27- Somali Ambassador to Germany, Ambassador Abdulaziz Mohamud Mohamed has formally presented his credentials as the ambassador to Hungary

========END========

#History #Reminder

In April 1988, Siad Barre and Mengistu Haile Mariam met again in Djibouti 🇩🇯 and signed a peace agreement on 4 April 1988, formally restoring diplomatic relations between Somalia 🇸🇴 and Ethiopia 🇪🇹, agreeing to withdraw troops from their mutual borders and committing not to support armed rebel movements against each other.

Despite this accord, Muj. Ahmed Mohamed Mohamoud Siilaanyo , the longest-serving chairman of the SNM Freedom fighters and later the fourth President of the Republic of Somaliland, chose a different path. While diplomatically accepting the restrictions from Ethiopia, he strategically secured fuel and logistical resources and prepared his forces for action inside Somaliland.

Only weeks later, on 27 May 1988, SNM freedom fighters launched a surprise assault and captured the city of Burao — a strategic victory in the struggle for Somaliland’s liberation.
The capture of Burao was the first major sign that Somaliland’s freedom was no longer a distant hope but an emerging reality.  

This was not rebellion born of chaos but strategy, discipline, and deep love for the homeland. Where others saw limits, Silaanyo saw opportunity. Where others hesitated, he acted with vision. His leadership continues to inspire us not only to remember where we came from, but to reflect on who we are capable of becoming.

Xaaladda siyaasadeed iyo amni ee dalka Itoobiya ayaa maraysa heer aad u cakiran, iyadoo colaadaha gudaha ay sii xoogeysanayaan, gaar ahaan gobolka Tigreega. Wararka ka imanaya gobolkaasi ayaa sheegaya in Ururka TPLF (Tigray People’s Liberation Front) uu go’aansaday in shacabka gobolka ay galaan xaalad degdeg ah, una diyaar garoobaan difaaca weerarka la filayo ee ka imaanaya caasimadda Addis Ababa. Go’aankan ayaa muujinaya heerka khatarta ah ee dalka uu marayo iyo kalsoonida la’aanta ka jirta dowlad dhexe.

Shir uu yeeshay Golaha Dhexe ee TPLF, ayaa lagu go’aamiyey arrimo muhiim ah oo taabanaya jiritaanka gobolka Tigreega iyo qaababka looga jawaabi karo xaaladaha cakiran. Waxa la isku afgartay in heshiiskii Pretoria ee Koonfur Afrika uu burburay, heshiiskiias oo ay 2dii November 2022 ku kala saxiixdeen Raysul Wasaare Abiye Axmed iyo TPLF si loo joojiyo colaadda. Burburka heshiiska ayaa ah digniin cad oo muujinaysa in wadahadaladii nabadeed ee u dhexeeyey dowladda federaalka iyo TPLF ay fashilmeen, isla markaana dagaal cusub uu dalka ku soo fool leeyahay.

Sida wararka lagu sheegay, dhammaan ciidanka booliska ee gobolka ayaa lagu amray in ay iska xaadiriyaan furimaha dagaalka, halka ciidankii hore ee hubkadhigista la sameeyey lagu amray in ay hubkooda qaataan iskana xaadiriyaan goobaha tababarka. Sidoo kale, dhammaan tuulooyinka gobolka waxaa la amray in ay diyaariyaan raashin, lana gaarsiiyo ciidamada dhufeysyada hore, taasoo muujinaysa in TPLF ay qorsheynayso difaac joogto ah oo ka dhan ah ciidamada dowladda federaalka. Dhallinyarada magaalooyinka Tigreega ayaa sidoo kale lagu amray in ay iska xaadiriyaan xeryaha tababarka ciidanka, arrintan oo ka dhigan in dagaalka laga dhigo mid bulsho oo wadajir ah. https://www.diblomaasi.com/xaaladaha-murugsan-ee-itoobiya-iyo-dagaal-sokeeye-oo-horleh/

Dad badan oo Somaliland ku nool, yar iyo weynba,  ayaa si fagaare ah u muujiyey  qaddarintooda Israel sababtoo ah aqoonsiga ay Somaliland heshay. 

Waxa la yaab leh in xasuuqii ay Soomaaliya ka geystay 1980-meeyadii dhulka Somaliland, in aysan marnaba cambaareyn dalalka Muslimiintu, si la mid ah sida ay uga waalacsan yihiin xaaladda Falastiin.

Caasimadda Hargeysa, waxaa ku yaal xusuus lagu muujinayo diyaaraddii dagaalka ee hore ee Soviet MiG, taasoo astaan u ah weerarradii baab’a ee ciidamada Soomaaliyeed ay fuliyeen dabayaaqadii 1980-meeyadii. Ka dib markii la aqoonsaday Somaliland, baraha bulshada waxaa buux dhaafiyey sawirro muujinaya dadweynaha Somaliland oo calanka Israel wata, xitaa mar uu qof calanka u isticmaalay hijab ahaan.

Suxufi Onal wuxuu xusay in Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya Hassan Sheekh Mohamud uu cambaareeyay aqoonsiga Israel, isagoo ku tilmaamay mid xadgudub ku ah madaxbannaanida Soomaaliya sidoo kale uu ku sheegay mid khatar ku ah nabadda gobolka. In kasta oo Somaliland leedahay dawlad madax-bannaan, baasaboorka u gaar ah, lacag, ciidan, iyo taariikh maamul oo madax-bannaan, Muqdisho weli waxay u aragtaa qayb ka mid ah Soomaaliya. Dalal Muslim ah oo kale ma raacin tallaabada Israel, iyadoo qaar ka cabsi qabaan in ay dhiirrigeliso dhaqdhaqaaqyo gooni u goosad ah oo gudaha dalalkooda ka dhaca.

Suxufigu wuxuu sidoo kale tilmaamay in Geeska Afrika, oo ku yaal inta u dhaxaysa Badweynta Hindiya iyo Kanaalka Suweys, uu noqday goob istiraatiiji ah oo awoodaha gobolka ay saameyn ku yeeshaan, iyadoo qaar ka mid ah dalalka sida Imaraadka Carabtu loo arko inay saameyn ku leeyihiin tallaabada Israel.

post_text_pi:
PRESS RELEASE

​The Jubaland State Government expresses its profound disappointment and condemnation regarding the irresponsible decision made today, which placed the advance delegation and the President of Jubaland's security detail in direct danger.

 This occurred after the Federal Government of Somalia denied their aircraft entry into the airspace of Aden Adde International Airport in Mogadishu.

​At the onset of the journey, the flight which departed from Sayid Mohamed Abdille Hassan International Airport in Kismaayo had been officially communicated to the Civil Aviation Authority, the conference organizing committee, and the Federal Government's security agencies. However, as the aircraft approached its landing in Mogadishu, a sudden order was issued for it to return to Kismaayo, without any verification of whether the plane had sufficient fuel for the return trip. This action reflects a significant lack of responsibility and a hostile decision that jeopardized the lives of the advance delegation.

​Furthermore, two civilian aircraft carrying passengers were also turned away from Mogadishu's airspace today, further illustrating the risks and chaos resulting from these measures.

​It is evident that the Federal Government, by dragging its feet on the Mogadishu Consultative Meeting, is committed to using every means possible to cancel the summit. This behavior demonstrates a lack of good faith and a failure of commitment to finding a solution to the country’s complex situation.

​We wish to clarify that no joint committee agreement exists regarding the number of security personnel or other guests accompanying the President’s delegation to Mogadishu. Any reports claiming that such an agreement was reached are entirely false and baseless.

​Jubaland State remains committed to pursuing a lasting solution to the current issues and ensuring the success of the scheduled Consultative Meeting. However, these recent actions create dangerous security conditions and raise serious questions about the Federal Government's reliability and sense of responsibility.

                   ​END

𝗦𝗢𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗠𝗜𝗬𝗔𝗔 𝗟𝗔 𝗔𝗤𝗢𝗢𝗡𝗦𝗔𝗗𝗔𝗬?

Waa musiibo marka hoggaamiye uu dadkiisa u horseedo tallaabo uusan siyaasad ahaan iyo sharci ahaan midna u fahmin. Somaliland wax aqoonsi ah kama helin Isaarii’iil oo Golaha Fulinta ama Barlmaanka (Knesset) midna lama marsiinin oo xitaa xeerarka iyo qawaaniinta ay Israa’iil leedahay kuma qotonto ictiraafkan la sheegay iney heshay Somaliland. 

Mashxaradda ka dhacaysa maamulka Cirro, waxay heleen waa saxiixa Netenyaahu oo ah go’aan siyaasadeed iyo dikreeto maamul oo kaliya ah. Hoggaanka Netenyahu hadduu is baddalo ama xaaladda gobolka wax ku soo kordhaan, warqad kale oo dikreeto ah ayaa lagu burin kaa ama in laga aamuso oo aanan lagu dhaqmin ayaa ku filan. 

Shacabka Somaliland ha ogaadaan in maamulka Cirro uusan wax sharciyad haysata u keenin ee uu caadifaddooda ku ciyaaray. Qoraalkan ugama doodeyno sax miyaa mise waa khalad falka uu Cirro ku kacay ee waa sharaxaad muujineysa in dareenka dadweynaha Somaliland loo sheegay wax been abuur ah.

#UPDATE: Turkey to expand military training and security support for Somalia

#Turkey will continue and expand its military training, consultancy and security support to #Somalia as part of efforts to enhance international stability, Defence Ministry spokesperson Rear Admiral Zeki Aktürk said.

Speaking at a weekly press briefing in #Ankara, Aktürk said Turkish support is focused on strengthening security and stability in Somalia. 

He noted that Turkey is providing assistance to protect drilling activities and the “Spaceport and Test Firing Range” under construction, as well as supporting counter-terrorism operations carried out by the Somali National Army.

Aktürk said the Turkish Armed Forces will maintain a strong deterrent presence through ongoing support and deployments in Somalia. 

Naval elements operating in the Gulf of Aden, off the Somali coast and in the Arabian Sea have conducted port visits to #Mogadishu.

A delegation from Turkey’s Naval Forces Command also recently visited Somalia to review ongoing activities and military cooperation between the two countries.

post_text_pi:
PRESS RELEASE

​The Jubaland State Government expresses its profound disappointment and condemnation regarding the irresponsible decision made today, which placed the advance delegation and the President of Jubaland's security detail in direct danger.

 This occurred after the Federal Government of Somalia denied their aircraft entry into the airspace of Aden Adde International Airport in Mogadishu.

​At the onset of the journey, the flight which departed from Sayid Mohamed Abdille Hassan International Airport in Kismaayo had been officially communicated to the Civil Aviation Authority, the conference organizing committee, and the Federal Government's security agencies. However, as the aircraft approached its landing in Mogadishu, a sudden order was issued for it to return to Kismaayo, without any verification of whether the plane had sufficient fuel for the return trip. This action reflects a significant lack of responsibility and a hostile decision that jeopardized the lives of the advance delegation.

​Furthermore, two civilian aircraft carrying passengers were also turned away from Mogadishu's airspace today, further illustrating the risks and chaos resulting from these measures.

​It is evident that the Federal Government, by dragging its feet on the Mogadishu Consultative Meeting, is committed to using every means possible to cancel the summit. This behavior demonstrates a lack of good faith and a failure of commitment to finding a solution to the country’s complex situation.

​We wish to clarify that no joint committee agreement exists regarding the number of security personnel or other guests accompanying the President’s delegation to Mogadishu. Any reports claiming that such an agreement was reached are entirely false and baseless.

​Jubaland State remains committed to pursuing a lasting solution to the current issues and ensuring the success of the scheduled Consultative Meeting. However, these recent actions create dangerous security conditions and raise serious questions about the Federal Government's reliability and sense of responsibility.

                   ​END
